programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Atlanta Prison Riot : In the 1980's the federal penitentiary in Atlanta held some of the country's most notorious prisoners. Castro called them undesirables. The U.S. government called them detainees. In 1987 they staged a bloody revolt.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Held Hostage : When a bank teller arrived at her parent's home the gunmen were already there. The robbers held her family hostage and forced her to empty a bank vault. If she didn't comply she could lose everyone she loved.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Criminal Enterprise : Caught in the act, a disguised bank robber hurled explosives at police and disappeared in a hail of bullets. When police identified the suspect, they connected him to an armed kidnapping, but they couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hunter's Game : In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Fateful Crossing : When the victim of a violent crime is a member of law enforcement, the job of investigating becomes personal. At a United States border crossing, armed fugitives kidnapped a customs' inspector then vanished.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Payout : In 1980 the FBI faced the largest explosive device they had ever seen. The bomb was sophisticated, carefully constructed, and designed to destroy an entire building.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Without Mercy : Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Terror For Sale : In the 1980s the drug trade ravaged Chicago's inner city neighborhoods. Heroin and cocaine sales soared. Violent crime threatened to destroy the community.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Held For Ransom : Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Dangerous Cause : In the late 70s and early 80s, a legitimate Puerto Rican independence movement took hold in the United States. But a splinter terrorist group known as the FALN was suspected of executing hundreds of bombings in major US cities.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Trail : The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: John Gotti: Convicted : John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Lost Boys : In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Brotherhood of Hate : In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drawing Conclusions : A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forsaken Trust : When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fatal Impressions : 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Seeds of Destruction : Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At Close Range : When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A Federal Offense : When there's a difficult case to crack whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Camera Clues : Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Women Who Kill : Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Murderous Attraction : In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Deadly Aim : Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own fingerprint, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing : Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lethal Encounter : In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger, the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Wasted Youth : When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxic Death : Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jim Bowie
programme.desc: The Swordsman : Jim Bowie has a fling in New Orleans’ high society, climaxing in a duel with a count over a glamorous aristocrat whom Bowie fancies.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jim Bowie
programme.desc: The Return of the Alcibiade : Jim Bowie takes a detour on a trip home from Christmas when a thief steals the gift he was taking to his mother. In pursuit, he lands on a plantation where he is mistaken for someone.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Oil Land : When a rancher discovers oil on his property, he is shot dead by one of his greedy workers. Cisco and Pancho are accused of the murder.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Chain Lightning : A fast-on-the-draw ex-con gets out of prison and is bent on killing Cisco and Bill Shannon for sending him there.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Medicine Flats : Cisco and Pancho work with a sheriff and beautiful undercover female agent for the cattlemen's association, to break up a cattle rustling operation.

programme.desc: Cruise Ship : Eddie warns Shauni that her new boyfriend Andrew is not a good guy. She ignores Eddie until Andrew gives her a black eye. Meanwhile, Craig and Mitch must stop an out of control party boat before it crashes into the crowded Santa Monica pier.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cretin of the Shallows : Several people are murdered at the beach by a mysterious man in ghoulish make-up and Eddie is knocked unconscious by what he describes as a "cretin." Eddie's report is met with skepticism until the identity of the killer is dramatically revealed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pride, Pt. 1 : Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pride, Pt. 2 : Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Gangsta Gangsta : Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Should I Stay or Should I Go? : Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Whisper to a Scream : Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against All Odds : Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Never Gonna Give You Up : Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holiday, Pt. 1 : The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Holiday, Pt. 2 : The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: This Charming Man : Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Accidents Will Happen, Pt.1 : It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Accidents Will Happen, Pt. 2 : Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Take On Me : Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Don't Dream It's Over : Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rock and Roll High School : Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Raining Men : The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: I Want Candy : A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Our House : Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Power Of Love : The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Ghost In the Machine, Pt.1 : It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Ghost In the Machine, Pt.2 : Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: King Of Pain : Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mercy Street : Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anywhere I Lay My Head : Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Islands In the Stream : In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Time Stands Still, Pt.1 : Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Time Stands Still, Pt.2 : Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Back In Black : After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Neutron Dance : Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: Project Blue Book Unknown : After World War II, an explosion in reported UFO sightings prompts the U.S. government to try and manage the public's growing fascination with them.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: The White House Cover-Up : The truth behind the organization known as the MJ-12 and its relationship with the mysterious events over Roswell.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: Code Name Aurora : It is said that the U.S. army possesses at least one crashed extraterrestrial craft; secrets behind the veil of the mysterious Project Aurora.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: Hacked And Leaked : Internal leaks and external hacks reveal governments possibly holding UFO intelligence; a man claims to have performed multiple alien autopsies.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: Soviet Secrets : Russia has its share of alleged sightings and secrets; something nuclear arms are to blame, but not all unidentified objects come from above.

programme.title: Top Secret UFO Projects Declassified
programme.desc: After Disclosure : Exploring whether aliens have visited Earth, what they would want with humans, and what their intentions might be.

programme.title: Hidden Histories of World War II
programme.desc: Tiger vs Sherman: Tank Action at Rauray : Examining a battle that highlighted the strategies the Allies used to win the war.

programme.title: Hidden Histories of World War II
programme.desc: Who Betrayed Jean Moulin? : Searching for the traitor who gave up the leader of the French Resistance.

programme.title: Hidden Histories of World War II
programme.desc: Thirty To One : Meet a pilot who single-handedly beat back the Luftwaffe in a warbird.

programme.title: Hidden Histories of World War II
programme.desc: The Poles at Monte Cassino : At the start of the Second World War, German forces pour into Poland from the west; the Soviet Union invade from the east; they wipe Poland off the map, leaving millions displaced.

programme.title: Spycraft
programme.desc: Clandestine Collection : Methods for capturing sensitive data have grown more advanced as devices have become exponentially smaller.

programme.title: Spycraft
programme.desc: Covert Communications : Intelligence officers acquire the information collected by sources, from old-school "dead drops" to high-tech digital transfers.

programme.title: Spycraft

programme.title: Spycraft

programme.desc: Enos Collins : East coast shipper creates a private fleet to seize American ships.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop

programme.title: 5 Flights Up
programme.desc: 5 Flights Up : When long-time married couple Ruth (Diane Keaton) and Alex (Morgan Freeman) decide to move away from New York City, they must contend with eccentric open house guests, their pushy realtor niece, and the health of their beloved family dog.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: An Unfinished Life : Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives in the Wyoming ranchlands with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.

programme.title: The Magic Of Belle Isle
programme.desc: The Magic Of Belle Isle : In an effort to tap into his original talent, a wheelchair-bound author moves to a rural town, where he befriends a single mother and her three kids, who help reignite his passion for writing. Directed by Rob Reiner.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Everybody's Hat Parade : Everybody's Hat Parade: Kai-lan notices Ye-Ye's gardening hat, and is inspired to make a hat of her own. When everyone in the backyard start making hats too, Kai-lan declares that they should have a hat parade!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Hoho's Big Night : Hoho's Big Flight: Today's the big lantern festival to celebrate the end of Chinese New Year! Ye-Ye gives Kai-lan some lanterns for her and her friends to decorate.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Safari Pals : Safari Pals: Kai-lan discovers some mysterious footprints, so there's only one thing to do – lead her friends on an educational safari through the backyard to find out who made them!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Twirly Whirly Flyers : Twirly Whirly Flyers: Kai-lan invents a game – Twirly Whirly Flyers – where she and her friends twirl flower blossoms into the air to try to get them into a big tree.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: The Snowiest Ride : The Snowiest Ride: Kai-lan wakes up to see snow blanketing the whole backyard! She finds a great hill for sledding, and sees some beautiful ice sculptures down at the bottom.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Tolee's Rhyme Time : Tolee's Rhyme Time: Kai-lan wants to start a music group and wants EVERYONE to be in it! Kai-lan plays her tambourine, Rintoo triumphs on the xylophone, Hoho scratches his turntables, and Lulu dances. But what can Tolee do in the music group?

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan's Campout : Kai-lan's Campout: Tonight Kai-lan is having a camp-out in the backyard, and we're all invited! Ye-Ye has set up a beautiful ladybug tent, and all of Kai-lan's friends come over, wearing their pajamas.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Wait, Hoho, Wait! : Wait, Hoho, Wait!: Rintoo gets a very special delivery today: a build-it-yourself toy car that everyone can ride in. Kai-lan is excited to help Rintoo and Tolee put it together and take a ride. But Hoho is sooo excited that he can't wait.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: The Ant Playground : The Ant Playground: Kai-lan is amazed to see the ants building a tiny playground full of fantastical rides. But they forgot to build a swing, and the playground is opening soon!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Happy Chinese New Year! : Happy Chinese New Year!: It's Chinese New Year, which means a big feast, red envelopes, and friends and family all together! Kai-lan and her friends are thrilled because this year, they are old enough to carry the huge dragon costume.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Ni Hao, Halloween : Ni Hao, Halloween: Trick or treat, it's Halloween! Kai-lan and her friends dress up to go trick or treating with Ye-Ye. Kai-lan is a dinosaur, Tolee's a panda, Hoho's the Monkey King, and Rintoo is his favorite – a dragon!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Beach Day : Beach Day: Kai-lan is excited because today she's going to the beach with Ye-Ye and her friends, to play in the sand, fly kites, and go in the water!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Roller Rintoo : Roller Rintoo: Kai-lan and her friends are off to a roller rink to go skating! But when Rintoo won't put on his roller skates, Kai-lan thinks something is wrong. It turns out that Rintoo is scared of roller skating.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Rain or Shine : Rain or Shine: Kai-lan and her friends are planning a big day of playing outdoors, when suddenly it starts to rain! Kai-lan happily finds a way to play in the rain, but Rintoo, Tolee and Hoho are very upset because of the rain.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan's Carnival : Ni Hao Kai-lan: Kai-lan and her friends wake up early today because...there's a CARNIVAL in the backyard with game booths, prizes and rides!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Lulu Day : Lulu Day: Today, Kai-lan is having a playdate with her best girl friend, Lu-lu the rhino! Kai-lan is ready with all sorts of games and things to play with Lu-lu. But Lu-lu wants to play with DIFFERENT things than Kai-lan.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Sports Day : Sports Day: Kai-lan LOVES dinosaurs, and today she's made up a whole bunch of Olympic-style Dinosaur Games to play with her friends!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan Goes to China : Kai-lan gets a phone call from her favorite great aunt , Gu-nai-nai, in China, inviting us to come to China and meet a baby panda! Ye-Ye, Kai-lan, and her friends take an airplane to China to meet the baby.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Ladybug Festival : Kai-lan and her friends are hiking through the woods to the big Ladybug Festival! Tolee gets frustrated when the others don't listen to what he has to say. Kai-lan needs your help to figure out what to do.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: The Dinosaur Balloon : Kai-lan, Rintoo and Stompy are making a special dinosaur-shaped balloon for Lulu's hot air balloon festival!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Playtime at Tolee's : Everyone's going over to Tolee's boat house to play, and Kai-lan invites us, too! All the friends have a great time... until Rintoo accidentally rips Tolee's new panda painting.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: The Moon Festival : Hoho is thrilled because he's finally old enough to stay awake for the Chinese Moon Festival. He gets disappointed when he can't see the moon in the cloudy sky and Kai-lan needs your help to figure out what to do.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan's Big Play : Kai-lan and her friends are putting on a play based on the Chinese folktale about the Monkey King. When Rintoo gets the part that Hoho wanted, Hoho quits the play and it's up to the viewer to help Kai-lan figure out what to do.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan's Big Surprise : Today, Kai-lan needs our help to plan a very special party for Ye-Ye to thank him for all he does for us. But when everything she plans goes wrong, Kai-lan gets very frustrated and starts to cry - much to the surprise of her friends!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Stompy Rides Again : Kai-lan and her friends are riding a TRAIN all the way to Hula Duck Island! Everyone loves riding the train through the backyard, but when it gets to Stompy's house, there are no seats left for their elephant friend on the train.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Rintoo's Big Flip : Kai-lan and her friends go to see the Chinese Rabbit Acrobats and are invited to be in the show! Rintoo is sure he'll be able to flip without practicing - no problem! Kai-lan needs your help to convince Rintoo to practice.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Rintoo Makes a Splash : Today, Ye-Ye is taking Kai-lan and our friends to a super special, magical water park! Everyone's having a blast – until Rintoo starts splashing, cannonballing, and playing much too rough.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: The Ants Dance : Kai-lan sees the ants dancing in Ant City, and is inspired to help them put on a big dance show for everyone to see! But when they start to get ready, a bossy ant named BuBu makes all the choices about the dance routine.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Lulu's Cloud : Today, we're all invited over to Lulu's magical house in the clouds! Kai-lan is thrilled that Mr. Dragon is flying us there.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Achilles Hill : Sam gets revenge on restaurateur John Allen Hill by dating his daughter.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Days Of Wine And Neuroses : Rebecca reveals her true feelings about Sam when Robin proposes.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Wedding Bell Blues : Sam tries to stop Rebecca's from marrying Robin after she confesses her feelings.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: I'm Getting My Act Together And Sticking It In Your Face : Sam inadvertently leaves a message on Rebecca's machine that he loves her.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam Time Next Year : Sam injures his back while on his annual Valentine's Day date with his old flame.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Crash Of The Titans : Sam and Rebecca try to buy the bar's poolroom and restrooms from John Allen Hill. In the end, Rebecca pays for the majority of the cost, in exchange for part ownership of Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: It's A Wonderful Wife : Norm's wife takes a job at the restaurant above Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cheers Has Chili : Woody increases traffic at Cheers by selling his famous chili.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla Loves Clavin : Cliff poses as a judge in the Miss Barmaid contest to win Carla's favor.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Pitch It Again, Sam : Sam plans to strike out an old baseball rival at a charity game.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rat Girl : Frasier fears Lilith is losing her mind when she's overcome with grief over the death of one of her laboratory rats.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Home Malone : Sam locks himself out of the house while babysitting for Lilith and Frasier's son.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Uncle Sam Wants You : Sam embarks on a search for a suitable mother to have his baby.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Baby Balk : Sam and Rebecca seek psychiatric help for getting in the mood.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Get Your Kicks On Route 666 : The guys of Cheers get stranded when they take a road trip on Route 66.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Madame LaCarla : Carla's psychic asks her to take over her spiritual reading business.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Norm Who Came To Dinner : Norm stays at Lilith and Fraiser's house while recovering from an injury.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Ma's Little Maggie : Cliff's mom wants him to get married when she meets his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Unplanned Parenthood : Woody hires an actress to pose as Kelly in a home video to his parents.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bar Wars V: The Final Judgement : Sam's convinced that the death of his rival is jus a silly one of his pranks.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Where Have All The Floorboards Gone? : Cliff's brainteaser could prove to be undoing of Kevin McHale.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Head Over Hill : Cliff's taken for a wild horse ride when he participates in a commemoration.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A Fine French Whine : Woody's girl agrees to marry Frenchman Henri to keep him from getting deported.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: I'm Ok, You're Defective : Rebecca blames Sam for their lack of offspring when she passes her fertility test.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Go Make : Sam and Rebecca question whether or not they really love each other.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Don't Shoot I'm Only The Psychiatrist : Frasier takes his "low self-esteem group" to Cheers for interactive therapy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: No Rest For The Woody : Woody takes a second job at a graveyard to pay for Kelly's engagement ring.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: My Son, The Father : Carla acts like a holy terror when her son decides to join the priesthood.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: One Hugs, The Other Doesn't : Frasier has a run-in with his first wife while at a children's concert with his family.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Insatisfait : South Park est désignée pour devenir le foyer du tout nouveau Centre d'Accomplissement d'Amazon.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La Vélo Parade : Les garçons craignent que la 1re place de la Vélo Parade ne leur échappe lorsque Kenny les lâche.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Joker mexicain : Randy affronte les habitants qui cultivent eux-mêmes leur herbe. Pendant ce temps-là, Kyle est emmené dans un camp.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: À l'assaut de la Chine : Randy souhaite exporter Tégrité en Chine.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mangez de la gelée : Cartman est persuadé que le nouveau menu de la cantine à base de plantes lui a provoqué une crise cardiaque.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La spéciale Halloween de la plantation Tégrité : C'est Halloween, et Randy est aux prises avec Shelley qui a un problème avec la marijuana.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Fin de saison : Les habitants de South Park en ont marre de Randy et de la plantation Tégrité et veulent l'envoyer en prison.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Jeux de filles : La compétition annuelle Super Femme pousse tout le monde à bout.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Voleurs de crottes : La mère de Kyle reçoit une transplantation fécale et les garçons partent à la recherche du meilleur microbiote.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Télévision par Câble : Scott Malkinson essaie désespérément d'impressionner sa nouvelle camarade de classe.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La neige de Noël : Le père Noël confisque toute la joie des habitants lors des fêtes de Noël.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Spécial Pandémie : Randy accepte difficilement le rôle qu'il a joué dans la pandémie de COVID-19 alors que la situation s'aggrave pour les habitants de South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: South ParQ spécial vaccination : Les habitants de South Park exigent un vaccin contre la COVID-19. Des militants refusent que M. Garrison se fasse vacciner. Randy reconnaît qu'il a joué un rôle dans la propagation de l'épidémie. Cartman n'est pas ravi de retourner à l'école."

programme.title: South Park: Cartman a une sonde anale
programme.desc: Cartman a une sonde anale : Les aliens implantent un émetteur dans Cartman et kidnappent le frère de Kyle.

programme.title: South Park: Muscle Plus 4000
programme.desc: Muscle Plus 4000 : Cartman tente de se muscler en prenant du Muscle Plus 4000. De son côté, Mr Garrison essaye d'assassiner Kathie Lee Gifford.

programme.title: South Park: Volcan
programme.desc: Volcan : Les enfants partent à la chasse avec Jimbo, l'oncle de Stan, lorsqu'un volcan entre en éruption. Cartman invente la légende de Kucrapok pour faire peur aux autres mais est-ce seulement imaginaire ?

programme.title: South Park: Un éléphant fait l'amour avec un cochon
programme.desc: Un éléphant fait l'amour avec un cochon : Les enfants cherchent à faire un croisement entre un éléphant et un cochon de lait.

programme.title: South Park: La Mort
programme.desc: La Mort : Marvin Marsh, le grand-père de Stan, veut absolument mourir. Il demande à son petit-fils de l'aider.

programme.title: South Park: Conjonctivite Aiguë
programme.desc: Conjonctivite Aiguë : Kenny meurt. À la morgue, les croque-morts se servent d'une sauce comme liquide d'embaumement.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Damien : Damien, le fils de Satan arrive à South Park où son père et Jesus s'apprêtent à livrer bataille.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Etherniopien
programme.desc: Le Petit Etherniopien : Pensant recevoir une montre à quartz, les enfants envoient cinq dollars en Éthiopie mais ils reçoivent en fait un enfant du pays.

programme.title: South Park: Monsieur Hankey, le petit caca Noël
programme.desc: Monsieur Hankey, le petit caca Noël : Noël approche et les enfants préparent un spectacle sur la naissance de Jésus. Mais voilà qui ne plait pas aux parents de Kyle, dont la famille est juive.

programme.title: South Park: Chirurgie Esthétique
programme.desc: Chirurgie Esthétique : M. Garrison doit subir une rhinoplastie et se fait remplacer par la sulfureuse Mlle Ellen.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Mecha Streisand : Barbara Streisand cherche à former le diamant de Panthéos pour revêtir sa forme ultime, Mecha Streisand, et détruire South Park.

programme.title: South Park: La mère de Cartman est une folle du cul
programme.desc: La mère de Cartman est une folle du cul : Cartman ignore qui est son père. Alphonse Mephisto veut bien l'aider mais les recherches coûtent 3000 $.

programme.title: South Park: La mère de Cartman est toujours une folle du cul
programme.desc: La mère de Cartman est toujours une folle du cul : Le suspense est à son comble, Mephisto va dévoiler qui est le père de Cartman, lorsque soudain on lui tire dessus.

programme.title: South Park: Le Charmeur de poules
programme.desc: Le Charmeur de poules : Le bibliobus arrive à South Park. Les enfants n'en ont cure, jusqu'à ce qu'une affaire de viol de poules n'éclate.

programme.title: South Park: Le Zizi de Ike
programme.desc: Le Zizi de Ike : Kyle apprend que ses parents veulent faire circoncire son frère. Pendant ce temps, M. Mackey découvre la drogue.

programme.title: South Park: Le Foetus Siamo Maxiliaire
programme.desc: Le Foetus Siamo Maxiliaire : Les citoyens de South Park viennent en aide à l'infirmière de l'école, qui a une étrange dégénérescence médicale.

programme.title: Divided
programme.desc: Nothing to Lose : A unique game show which is as much about convincing others as it is about knowing the right answers. Four strangers including a yoga instructor and a tech expert must debate and unanimously agree against a racing clock.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Free Agent : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes smoking 2 packs of cigarettes a day and not having a boyfriend in 9 years.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Prize in Disguise : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes disguising herself to get free food samples and flushing the toilet once a day.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: A Chants at Love : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes being obsessed with serial killers and chanting 4 times a day.

programme.title: Baggage on the Road
programme.desc: Gotta Have the Boom : Jerry Springer travels to Baton Rouge to help LSU student Tesia look for love. As daters reveal their bad qualities first, this strong woman must decide if two of the men's unusual fears will be deal-breakers for her.

programme.title: Baggage on the Road
programme.desc: That Big Chocolate Drop : Jerry Springer travels to the beach in Tampa to help personal trainer Antwaun look for love. As two of the women highlight body parts that might need improving, he must decide if one of them is a deal-breaker.

programme.desc: The Craziest Moves : A unique game show which is as much about convincing others as it is about knowing the right answers. Four strangers including a former NFL player and a taqueria owner must debate and unanimously agree against a racing clock.

programme.desc: Aromatherapy : An old man, inexplicably emanating a horrible stench, consults Doctor Ellingham. Meanwhile, the local radio host, Caroline, seems to have a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Always on My Mind : Martin examines Helen Pratt, but she collapses and dies. Her husband, Phil, is angry with the doctor and blames him for his wife's death.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The Family Way : Martin is puzzled when his cold and difficult parents come to stay with him, though he hasn't seen them in seven years.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Out of the Woods : PC Mark Mylow plans to spend his stag night sleeping rough in the woods with Al Large, but gets bitten by an adder.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Erotomania : A Salvation Army member arrives in Portwenn trying to trace a missing woman; Danny asks reluctant girlfriend Louisa to move in with him and Mark Mylow's medical check has a shocking result.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The Apple Doesn't Fall : Aunt Joan is forced to receive treatment from Martin after nearly running someone over. The Doc is approached by Alison Lane, who worries about her daughter Delph's behavior.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Movement : Bert Large abandons his plumbing business in favor of running a restaurant. Following the restaurant's opening, several cases of food poisoning occur, with Louisa being one of the people affected.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Blood Is Thicker : Al discovers that Bert is not his natural father; Martin diagnoses food poisoning for a rural family with a mysterious unseen mother.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Aromatherapy : An old man, inexplicably emanating a horrible stench, consults Doctor Ellingham. Meanwhile, the local radio host, Caroline, seems to have a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Always on My Mind : Martin examines Helen Pratt, but she collapses and dies. Her husband, Phil, is angry with the doctor and blames him for his wife's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Big Chill : For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time Will Tell : In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunting Vision : Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Welcome Intrusion : A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Window Watcher : In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shot of Vengeance : A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: All Butt Certain : A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who's Your Daddy : In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Purebread Murder : In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids apartment after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nursery Crimes : An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Waste Mis-Management : Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Tight Leash : How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Smoke in your Eyes : A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Capitol Crimes : The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Clutch of Witnesses : Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dark Waters : When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: All Charged Up : Using an anonymous letter and geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Case of the Flue : In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Badge of Deceit : Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Gambler : One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Cats, Flies & Snapshots : When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Small Town Terror : In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nailed : Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No Safe Place : A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Daughter's Journey : Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: Forensic Files : 25 years after its premiere, Forensic Files remains the most successful true-crime series of all time. Inspired by the O.J. Simpson murder case, the series went onto over 400 episodes where science catches the bad guys.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Home Evasion : In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Magic Bullet : A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The House That Roared : A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Days of Misrule : Barnaby has to solve an explosion as well as a number of murders near a freight company while trying to cope with his acting CS who has very strong beliefs about teamwork.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Talking to the Dead : Barnaby finds connections between a supposedly haunted forest, the traceless disappearances of two couples and a gang of antiquity thieves.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Left for Dead : Jones is brought back to his home town to help investigate a series of murders linked to childhood friends and events that occurred years earlier.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer Life : When a missing man turns up dead in the woods near Midsomer, Barnaby finds connections between him and a magazine editor known for his bad reviews of local hotels and restaurants.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Magician's Nephew : The traditions of the Temple of Thoth, a local cult in Midsomer, appear to be related to a series of murders using poison of the poison dart frog.

programme.desc: Days of Misrule : Barnaby has to solve an explosion as well as a number of murders near a freight company while trying to cope with his acting CS who has very strong beliefs about teamwork.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Follow the Money : In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The FBI Declassified: 20 Days of Terror: The Austin Bomber : The Bureau works side by side with multiple law enforcement agencies to identify, track and catch a serial bomber who killed and maimed random victims in Austin in the spring of 2018.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Strange Life of Dr. Schwartz : The investigation into the murder of a beloved Florida doctor reveals his dark, secret past.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Where's Our Baby? : In November 1997, Marlene and Steve Aisenberg reported their five-month-old daughter Sabrina missing from her crib. Police soon focused on the parents as authorities became convinced that they knew more about the baby’s disappearance than they admitted.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Death at Cottonwood Creek : Frederick Mueller says while he and his wife were out for a walk near their vacation home, she fell off a cliff while he stopped to take a photo of her. Was it murder or an accident?

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Confession : A report on the 1998 murder, of 12-year-old Stephanie Crowe. The girl's 14-year-old brother Michael, and his two friends confessed to the killing. Their attorney claims that the confessions were false and the result of police coercion.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The McGuire Diaries : In May of 2004, Bill McGuire’s dismembered body was found in three suitcases in Chesapeake Bay. He had been shot with a .38 caliber gun. His wife Melanie claimed that Bill had vanished weeks before, after an argument.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Texas Confidential : A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Betting Her Life : Susan Wright was a stay-at-home mother from Texas who stabbed her husband Jeff, 193 times. She claimed she was a victim of domestic abuse and that on January 13, 2003, her husband attacked her with a knife and she fought back in self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Mystery of Slide Mountain : A report that examines evidence and unanswered questions regarding a June 1, 1998 auto accident on Slide Mountain, near Reno, Nevada, that led to the death of Rinette Riella Bergna and left the driver, Rinette’s husband Peter with only minor injuries.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Long Island Serial Killer : A report on the disappearance of Shannan Gilbert, near Gilgo Beach, New York. The search for Shannan led to the discovery of a total of ten bodies in the scrub brush of Gilgo Beach, leading police to suspect the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Scared to Death : Police Lt. Jim Barton found his wife, Vickie, murdered execution-style on their farm in Warren County, Ohio, in 1995. With limited physical evidence and no suspects, the investigation lay dormant for nine years until a tip opened the case.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The FBI Declassified: The Spies Next Door : Inside one of the Bureau's most important counterintelligence investigations to track Russian operatives living in America and seeking critical secrets.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Nightmare in Napa : A report on the October 2004 murders of former beauty queen Leslie Mazzara and her roommate, Adriane Insogna, in the bedrooms of their Napa, California home. A third roommate, Lauren Mianza, sleeping downstairs, was not harmed and was the only witness

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Justice For Sheila? : This report offers fresh insight into the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, a Sarasota, Florida mother of quadruplets who was killed in front of her children.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: My Father's Killer : James Bernard Campbell entered Suezann Bosler's home, murdered her father and almost killed her. 48 HOURS follows Suezann as she returns to the crime scene and then focuses on her unusual crusade for justice.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Playful Paradise / Rowan and Curtis : Rowan and his son Curtis just bought a 3 bedroom lake house to enjoy and rent out for part of the year. But the property is looking bland and boring.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Scandi Ski Chalet / Vicky and Todd : Vicky and Todd recently bought a dated old house near a ski hill, and they think it could earn them some money, if the proper reno job were done.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Throwback Getaway / Erin and Gerald : Erin and Gerald are the owners of a rundown cottage they don’t use so much anymore. They’re hoping that a good renovation will turn it into a profit generator.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Zen’d Out Retreat / Caroline and Gihad : For front line health care workers Caroline and Gihad, the decision to buy a cottage was influenced by their stressful jobs. They wanted a place to relax and decompress.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Anne and Karen : Anne and her sister, Karin, bought their duplex from their landlord a couple of years ago. Now, Karin has unexpectedly fallen in love and she's moving out. That leaves Anne with a full mortgage to pay.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Daria and James : Daria and James fell in love, got engaged and bought a house. Two years later they are still not married and they’re spending over 50% of their income on their home. They need an income suite.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: David : Scott McGillivray helps first-time home buyer David create a perfect income suite.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Evelyn and Armel : Evelyn and Armel had an energy audit and now they’re racking up debt in order to make smart improvements to their home. They need the income from an apartment to help out with the costs of renovating for the long-term.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Fernando and David : Fernando and his partner David have a lot of taste and energy. They bought a neglected triplex with the intention of painstakingly renovating every nook and cranny. Unfortunately, they ran out money and energy.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Jen and In-Suk : Jennifer and In-Suk experienced a financial setback. With Jennifer on maternity leave and In-Suk unemployed for the last seven months, this couple needs an income suite to offset their mortgage costs.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Julia and Andy : Julie and Andy intend to renovate the existing income suite in their new home. They just can’t make it happen. They have demanding careers and no renovation experience. They need Scott’s skills and reno savvy.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Lise and Andre : Lise will be 63 years old when her 35-year mortgage is finally paid off. With an basement income suite, she could be mortgage free in 13 years, at 39! Scott will help set Lise on the path to financial freedom.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Marsha, Ellwood and Sarah : Marsha and Ellwood married 4 years ago bringing two kids each to their blended home and a future with three college educations to consider.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Rob and Allison : Allison and Rob’s income dipped due to a career change and maternity leave. Luckily, they have an income suite in their basement that can help them maintain their great standard of living.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Victoria and Evan : Victoria and Evan are young, smart and ambitious. Two years ago, the pair started a business together with offices in two separate cities.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Andrea & Luke : Andrea and Luke have a five-year financial plan based on the second floor apartment being consistently rented.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Antonette & Mike : Antoinette and Mike need a safe income suite tout de suite because Antoinette is expecting and they need the extra income.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Bonnie & Merv : Bonnie and Merv have credit card debt in addition to a big mortgage. They need Scott’s help to complete their basement income suite so that they can get out of debt and down the aisle before the end of the year.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Courtney & Emily : Courtney and Emily need to get their unfinished basement renovated to a high standard apartment ASAP to be able to afford the extra $100,000 mortgage they took on to buy the home.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Crystal & Courtney : During 18 months of unemployment, Crystal came to depend on her improvised, second floor apartment to avoid defaulting on her mortgage while racking up major debts to keep the house running.

programme.title: Income Property
programme.desc: Jeremy & Angie : Jeremy and Angie need to renovate their dilapidated basement apartment because they desperately need the income. If they don’t rent it out they will forgo the dream of Angie staying home to raise their young son.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Artistic Retreat : The former art studio at the back of Sarah and Nick’s property does little more than store junk, but what if it could generate income to finance their future goals?

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Back to the Future : Christine and Sam’s newly purchased vacation property looks like a time capsule from the 1970’s. Scott harnesses the swinging 70’s look of the home, but adds 21st Century tech to create a groovy, functional tech getaway.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Beach Bungalow : With rolling sand dunes, powdery sand and epic sunsets just outside the door, Eva and Stewart should have no problem renting their beachside property. Problem is, no one has renovated the place since the 1970’s.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Bienvenido A Casa : After a recent fire and years of neglect, sisters Jessica, Sabrina and Sue need Scott’s help turning a giant problem into profit.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: More Fang for Your Chuck : Margaret must represent Chuck when he faces 20 years in federal prison after being accused of fixing a cash prize giveaway at the Portland Widows hockey game.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Are You There Todd? It's Me, Margaret : When Margaret is too sick to work on the final day of an important negotiation, Todd must step in and act as a proxy while Margaret uses her investigative skills. Also, Margaret and Gus finally share their first kiss.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Shell Game : The CSI team investigates a case where an ambitious investigative reporter is found dead at a peanut factory. Also, everyone in the crime lab buzzes over who Max will promote to day shift supervisor.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Dying Words : The CSI team investigates a murder case that hits close to home for Folsom. When he is forced to sit this investigation out, he does his own digging with help from Trey.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: The Reaper : With their respected colleague Josh Folsom under arrest for the death of Kahn Schefter, the CSI team combs through every crumb of forensic evidence to determine his innocence or guilt.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: Paniolo : When a beloved Paniolo (Hawaiian cowboy) is shot while out riding his horse, Jane and her team must gain the trust of the Paniolo community to help find the culprits and protect the Paniolo's life.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: Gaijin : When a Japanese sailor is killed on American soil and evidence links the case to the previous murder of the victim's girlfriend back in Japan, NCIS must find the murderer before the wrong person is accused and the case triggers a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: The Tourist : When Tennant and NCIS are tasked with finding a kidnapped globe-trotting social media star, they find that she is not who her husband, or her followers, think she is. Also, the team is at odds with Whistler, who has an agenda of her own.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Take Out : Don and his team investigate a rash of deadly restaurant robberies.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: End of Watch : Don and the FBI re-open a 17-year-old unsolved case when the badge of a missing LAPD officer, who is presumed dead, is found at a construction site.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Contenders : When a competitive mixed-martial arts fighter dies suspiciously in the ring while training for a championship match, the victim's sparring partner, who also happens to be friends with David, becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: 86'd : Margaret represents Lauren (Jamie Chung), Susan's good friend, in a hostile work environment lawsuit after she quits her job at a Michelin-starred restaurant, but it unexpectedly turns into a murder trial when the head chef is found dead.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: More Fang for Your Chuck : Margaret must represent Chuck when he faces 20 years in federal prison after being accused of fixing a cash prize giveaway at the Portland Widows hockey game.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Are You There Todd? It's Me, Margaret : When Margaret is too sick to work on the final day of an important negotiation, Todd must step in and act as a proxy while Margaret uses her investigative skills. Also, Margaret and Gus finally share their first kiss.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Iceland Was Horrible : Margaret and Todd tackle a case involving a murder on live local morning news and must rethink their working relationship after Todd decides to open his own PI business.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Your Day in Court : As Margaret and Todd work on two separate cases, Todd suspects a crime is happening in the courthouse right under their noses.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: The Queen of Courts : Margaret and Todd defend the "Queen of Hearts" (Sandra Bernhard), a notoriously unscrupulous lawyer accused of orchestrating a fraudulent accident that resulted in the death of a "fake victim."

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: Abraham Shakespeare : Lottery winner Abraham Shakespeare was murdered in 2009 by Dee Dee Moore, who sought to steal his fortune.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: William Saunderson-Smith : In 2011, a reclusive British millionaire was beaten to death by three men seeking his hidden fortune.

programme.title: Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: Anthony Ashley-Cooper : In a high-profile case, police discovered the remains of an aristocrat, leading them to his estranged wife.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Target: Mafia: Empire Of Crime : The Mafia builds its own world--nightclubs, racetracks, and casinos--and climbs to the highest levels of power. Vito Genovese accompanies General Patton.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Target: Mafia: Gangbusters : Examines the triangular relationship between politicians, lawmen, and the underworld. Features the murderous Dutch Schultz and his target D.A. Thomas Dewey.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Target: Mafia: Secrets Unveiled : Covers the Kefauver Hearings in 1950 that were the public's first exposure to the depth and brutality of the Mafia's dealings.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Target: Mafia: The Showdown : Covers the infamous New York mob families from the murder of Paul Castellano outside Sparks Steak House to the new Mafia--brutal gangs from Colombia and Russia.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Free To Kill: The Polly Klaas Murder : A probe into the justice system's failure to protect society from career criminals. Focuses on the case of Richard Allen Davis who abducted and murdered 12-year-old Polly Klaas.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Outlaws : Story of the Old West's most murderous villains, including the James Younger gang, the first real bank robbers in America; the Dalton Brothers; and, Butch Cassidy's Wild Bunch.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
