programme.desc: It's All a Ruse! : Amesha says D'jarvis is a liar, cheater, and a fraud who convinced her he was living the high life when he was actually homeless.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: False Impressions : After being married less than a year Shante says Donnell is not the man she thought he was. According to Shante, Donnell is a liar and she wants out of this marriage.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: On and Off with Love, Not Money! : After a 5 year on and off again relationship Cindy called it quits. She wants the money Tramere owes her to bring closure to their relationship.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Jealousy the Green Monster : Vanessa says Visall's temper and jealousy is destroying their relationship.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Costly Ultimatum : Joseph wants his girlfriend, Amy, to move out or start paying rent after refusing to have a threesome.

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "What freaky stuff have you done?"

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "What kind of girl do you date?" "Any girl that puts out, really..."

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "I never thought in a million years I'd meet my future husband on Blind Date."

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "Will you Molly, whose last name I don't know, marry me?"

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "Life is about grimy sex and nothing else"

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan : Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Full of Enthusiasm! The Corrida Colosseum! : Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Dangerous Love! The Dancer Girl - Violet! : Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Formidable, Unknown Warrior! Here Comes Lucy! : Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Pirate Noble! Cavendish! : While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Super Rookie! Bartolomeo the Cannibal! : The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Names Duke It Out! The Heated Block B Battle! : Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Deadly Blow! The Astonishing King Punch! : The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Fighting Fish Strike! Across the Deadly Iron Bridge! : As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Explore! Fairies' Island - Green Bit! : Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Unknown World! The Tontatta Kingdom! : All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Stratagem of the Century! Doflamingo Makes His Move! : Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shaking Heaven and Earth! Admiral Fujitora's Power! : Sanji and Franky try to regroup after Doflamingo's betrayal, hoping that destroying the factory is not yet out of their grasp. Meanwhile Luffy makes a friend in the Colosseum and Usopp ends up thrust into an uncomfortable position!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Blow of Anger! A Giant vs. Lucy! : The Sunny is mysteriously deformed by the bizarre powers of Giolla! Can Nami, Chopper, and Brook act in time to save their beloved home? Meanwhile, the battle for Block C continues as Luffy suffers a staggering setback.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Destruction Cannon Blasts! Lucy in Trouble! : After knocking down the Giant, Hajrudin, as payback for what he did to Ucy, Luffy has to deal with Ideo, whose punch has the destructive force of a bomb, while the Funk Brothers show off their bizarre fighting technique.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Legendary Pirate! Don Chin Jao! : Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Light and Shadow! Darkness behind Dressrosa! : Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Making a Sortie! The Legendary Hero Usoland! : The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Fierce Battle Coming to the End! Lucy vs. Chin Jao! : Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Gladiator of Fate - Rebecca! : With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Protect You to the End! Rebecca and the Toy Soldier! : Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Last - and Bloodiest - Block! Block D Battle Begins! : As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle! Giolla vs. the Straw Hats! : Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Beautiful Sword! Cavendish of the White Horse! : Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Big Clash! Sanji vs. Doflamingo! : Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's Special Attack! Last-Ditch Sword Dance! : Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Most Violent Fighter! Logan vs. Rebecca! : Bartolomeo searches the Colosseum for Luffy but stumbles upon the medical center for the losers of the battles in the ring, but is everything at this center as it seems? Meanwhile, Rebecca has to fend off Rolling Logan's vicious bone-crushing grip attack.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Big Surprise! The True Identity of the Toy Soldier! : The losers of the Colosseum battle who are being held below the infirmary have a surprising person in their midst! But do they have a clue as to their terrifying fate? Meanwhile, the Tontatta Kingdom's history is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Horrible Past! The Secret of Dressrosa! : Bartolomeo finally finds Luffy and starts to lead him to Zoro, while the toy soldier begins to tell the heart-breaking story of how Doflamingo cheated the Riku dynasty out of their control of Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Nightmare! The Tragic Night of Dressrosa! : As the toy soldier's story continues, the sad fate of King Riku and his army, and his daughter Princess Viola, is revealed as well as how the people of Dressrosa fell into the hands of Doflamingo. And all the toys in the country share a mysterious secret.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Star Mountain : Swiper swipes Dora's favorite necklace and flings it all the way to the top of Star Mountain! To get to the peak, Dora and Boots need to run up the Star Steps, climb up the Diamond, and make it through ice, wind, and snow!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: La Maestra de Musica : "Hola, hola!/ Hello, Hello!/ It's a great day for school/ You know!" Boots' music teacher, la maestra de música, needs to get to school in a hurry - but her bicycle is broken!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Daisy, La Quinceanera : It's Dora's cousin Daisy's 15th birthday party, her quinceañera! But the party can't start without Dora and Boots - they need to teach everybody the mambo!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Save Diego : Dora's cousin Diego protects and defends all the animals in the rainforest. But in order to save a Baby Condor, Diego winds up trapped himself. And now he needs OUR help! ¡No te preocupes, Diego!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Jaguar's Roar : Oh no! Baby Jaguar's best friend, Baby Bear, is stuck on a ledge atop Bear Mountain - and the ledge is cracking! With Baby Jaguar leading the way, Dora, Boots, and Diego race to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: A Crown for King BoBo : Dora and Boots set out to help King Juan el Bobo find his crown so we can all go to his Mamí's birthday party. Where did the forgetful king put his crown?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Got a Puppy : Abuela gives Dora and Boots a present for Dora's new puppy, but they'll have to watch out for Swiper, who's got a bunch of new swiping tricks up his sleeves.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Big Sister Dora : Dora has some really exciting news to tell us: Someone new is joining Dora's family! Someone who sleeps in a cradle, drinks from a bottle, wears diapers and likes to be rocked to sleep. Can you guess who it is? That's right!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots to the Rescue : Oh, no! Dora left her music homework in Boots' room. It's a song in English and Spanish, and she needs Boots to bring it to her school so she can sing it to the class.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Super Babies : Dora's baby brother and sister just love bananas, but they also love stories! So Dora tells them a Super Babies story! The Super Babies have to get their bananas back from that Super Villain Swiper the Fox.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: We're a Team : Dora and all her friends are at the Super Adventure Race! To win the race, they have to make it across the Troll's tricky Bridge, past the Volcano filled with gooey balls, over the giant wall, and all the way to the finish line.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Mixed-Up Seasons : It's summertime, and Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach. But suddenly, they encounter the strangest sight - a snowman in Summer? What's wrong with this picture? Oh, no!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Shy Rainbow : Dora and Boots are hiking on Rainbow Rock when they come across a shy rainbow, Arco Iris, hiding behind a waterfall.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Crab : Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach when all of a sudden they hear a call for help. It's a baby crab stuck in a net!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper the Explorer : Dora and Boots are playing catch when they discover a lost Baby Fox. And he wants his mommy! Just then, Swiper shows up to swipe Boots' superball.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Jack-in-the-Box : Dora's twin brother and sister have been sick and she wants to buy them a present to cheer them up. Way up on a toy store shelf, she finds a dusty Jack-in-the-Box.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bark, Bark to Play Park : It's Twins Day and everyone's getting ready for the big Twins Day Party at Play Park! Dora even has a surprise for her puppy Perrito. He has a twin too -- a long-lost puppy brother he hasn't seen since they were babies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves Three Kings Day : "Happy Three Kings Day!" Dora, Boots, and Diego are dressed up as kings for the big Three Kings Day party. They'll be bringing a horse, a camel, and an elephant to carry the presents, and treats for the party, but Swiper scares the animals away!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Isa's Unicorn Flowers : Dora and Isa are planting Isa's special unicorn flowers when suddenly a baby unicorn, Unicornio, rides in on a Rainbow. He's thrilled to see Isa's beautiful flowers because they're his Mami's favorite.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny's Big Race : Benny is so excited – it's his first time in the Big Go-Cart Race, where everyone races in homemade go-carts! But when the whistle blows, Benny's cart backfires and falls to pieces. But Dora and Boots won't let him give up.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: First Day of School : Boots and Tico are really excited because it's their first day of school ever -- and in their new school, they'll learn in English and Spanish!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Backpack Parade : Backpack, Backpack, yeah!!! Today's the Backpack Parade, where everyone dresses up their backpacks in different costumes. Backpack is super excited 'cause this year she gets to lead the parade with her song.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bouncy Boots : "Special delivery for Boots the monkey!" Boots' favorite boots are back from the Shoe Shop, but when he tries them on, he starts to bounce, bounce, bounce. These aren't his boots -- these are bouncy boots.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Mayan Adventure : Dora reads us a Mayan story about twin brothers who were amazing ballplayers. A long time ago in a Mayan Kingdom, there was a big Ball Game Championship.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves the Three Little Piggies : Dora and Boots are reading their favorite story, "The Three Little Pigs" when suddenly we hear the Piggies calling out for help. Their brick house is missing some bricks and the Big Bad Wolf is going to blow it down!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's Magic Show : ABRACADABRA! The Big Red Chicken's putting on a magic show for all of his friends. With an "abracadabra," he pulls a rabbit out of his hat, but when it's time to make the bunny disappear, it doesn't work!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny's Treasure : It's Junk Day and Benny's showing Dora and Boots his wagon of cool junk. But when the junk truck accidentally takes Backpack and Map off to the junkyard, it's up to Dora, Boots, Benny and his wagon of stuff to rescue them!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Super Babies' Dream Adventure : It's naptime for the twins and Dora has a special Super Babies naptime story. Once upon a time, the Super Babies were getting ready for their nap but the Dream Fairy never showed up because she was still asleep!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Pirate Treasure Hunt : Pirate Piggy really wants to be in the big Pirate Treasure Hunt, but his Piggies got tummyaches. He needs at least 3 mates to help him find the sunken treasure. Dora, Boots, and L'il Piggy will be his pirate mates -- yay!

programme.title: Unthinkable
programme.desc: Unthinkable : A Muslim extremist places three separate nuclear bombs in mystery locations around America. With our country’s entire counter-terrorism force rushing to action, the culprit is soon apprehended, but the whereabouts of his bombs remain unknown.

programme.title: Dark Tide
programme.desc: Dark Tide : A professional diver tutor returns to deep waters after 1 year, following an almost fatal encounter with a great white shark. The nightmare from the deep is still lurking - more carnivorous and hungry than ever.

programme.title: Cover-Up
programme.desc: Cover-Up : A tough ex-U.S. Marine journalist battles against time to save the lives of thousands of innocent people after uncovering a complex terrorist plot.

programme.desc: Dark Tide : A professional diver tutor returns to deep waters after 1 year, following an almost fatal encounter with a great white shark. The nightmare from the deep is still lurking - more carnivorous and hungry than ever.

programme.title: Dragonwolf
programme.desc: Dragonwolf : A city where depravity and violence has forged a society in which only the lethal and callous can survive, two young men who possess the intellect and ferocity to flourish, carve a name for themselves as the most efficient and unstoppable hit men.

programme.title: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: Rescue Dawn : In 1965, while bombing Laos, pilot Dieter Dengler crashes in the jungle. Dieter is arrested, tortured and sent to a prison camp, where he organizes an escape plan. A betrayal splits the group and Dieter finds that the jungle is the actual prison.

programme.title: A Mighty Wind
programme.desc: A Mighty Wind : When folk icon Irving Steinbloom passed away, he left a family of performers he had shepherded to folk stardom. For one night only in New York City's Town Hall, three groups will reunite to celebrate the music that almost made them famous.

programme.title: Lovesick
programme.desc: Lovesick : Charlie has everything: a great job, friends, family, the whole package. However, he doesn't have love.

programme.title: Landline

programme.desc: Bandits : The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Cloverfield : Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 13 Chefs Compete : The teams cook lunch for firefighters who are in the midst of a charity ride. The winners head to Malibu, dine at a vineyard and sip wine with Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 12 Chefs Compete : The remaining chefs are treated to live Greek dancing. Afterwards, they must choose a protein to cook a Greek dish with. The winners race go-karts while the losers clean the kitchens.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 11 Chefs Compete : Each team must create a dish using either beer, wine or liquor. “Cheers” star John Ratzenberger appears as a guest judge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 9 Chefs Compete : The remaining chefs must cook with exotic proteins, including ostrich and wild boar, to impress Chef Ramsay and the owners of the restaurant Animal.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 8 Chefs Compete (Part One) : The chefs cook a Mardi Gras-themed homecoming dinner for Calabasas High School. Both teams have 35 minutes to create three meals for the homecoming committee.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 8 Chefs Compete (Part Two) : The teams participate in the annual blind taste test. The winners go on a shopping spree and sample caviar. The losers make sangria and lug tabletops into the dining room.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 7 Chefs Compete : The chefs must rifle through a pile of keys to find the one that opens a locker full of steak cuts. After cooking their dishes, they present them to Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 6 Chefs Compete : The chefs participate in the annual "taste it, now make it" challenge. The winners spend the day on the RMS Queen Mary in Long Beach while the losers sort the recycling.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 5 Chefs Compete : The remaining contestants are given just 45 minutes to make small dishes for the guests at a private concert featuring the UCLA Herb Alpert School of Music orchestra.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 4 Chefs Compete : Chef Ramsay gives each of the final four $25 and ten minutes to find ingredients for a vegetarian dish. The winner gets a dinner at Studio in Laguna Beach.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Winner Chosen : The finalists have one hour to devise five unique dishes that will be judged by an array of 5 of the world's top chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 18 Chefs Compete : For their first challenge, the contestants have 45 minutes to prepare their signature dishes for a discerning Chef Ramsay. The winners attend Drai's Nightclub as VIP guests.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 17 Chefs Compete : The chefs have twenty minutes to make baskets of shrimp dumplings. The winners take a helicopter to Malibu for lunch with Chef Ramsay at Geoffrey's.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 16 Chefs Compete : To improve communication skills, Chef Ramsay gives each chef a jacket with a recipe on the back. The teammates must relay the recipes to one another.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 15 Chefs Compete : Each chef gathers five rubber ducks with ingredients on them, then uses the ingredients to construct a duck dish. The winners travel by yacht to a Santa Monica penthouse.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 14 Chefs Compete : Each team must create a holiday platter representing three major holidays: the Fourth of July, Cinco de Mayo and Mardi Gras. The winners get a wine mixing lesson.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 12 Chefs Compete : In this episode, Chef Ramsay takes the remaining contestants to the supermarket for another grocery challenge.

programme.title: Marry Me in Yosemite

programme.title: Styled with Love

programme.title: Walking The Dog

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Leah Remini, Beauty Tips with Patrick Starrr : Game Show week concludes with “People Puzzler” host Leah Remini. Then, Drew is talking all things beauty with beauty influencer Patrick Starrr. Plus, Drew and Ross Matthews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new “Drew’s News.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "Charlie’s Angels" Reunion With Cameron Diaz & Lucy Liu, Adam Sandler : "The Drew Barrymore Show" kicks-off its premiere episode with a "Charlie’s Angels" reunion with Cameron Diaz and Lucy Liu. Drew also reunites with longtime friend / co-star Adam Sandler. Drew has a big surprise for a deserving family of essential workers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Michael Strahan, Cookbook Club with Jamie Oliver : "Good Morning America's" Michael Strahan joins Drew and tasks her with an extra messy stain challenge. Jamie Oliver whips up shrimp linguine and discusses his new book. Soccer player Leslie Osborne on creating a beauty line that outlasts your workout.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Andra Day, Ben & Erin Napier, Drew’s News : “The United States vs. Billie Holiday” star Andra Day stops by to chat. Design week continues with “Home Town” stars Ben and Erin Napier who help a VFF transform their bookshelf from boring to beautiful. Plus, Ross and Drew with a new Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Martha Stewart, Beauty In A Box, Dog Makeover with Jess Rona, The Weekender : Martha Stewart whips up a dish with Drew. Drew surprises a viewer who wants to ramp up her beauty routine for work Zooms. Comedian and dog groomer Jess Rona glams up a special pup. Drew gives a list of favorites in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kate Mara, Molly Sims, Holiday Food Traditions with Eitan : "A Teacher" star Kate Mara stops by to chat. Model and actress Molly Sims on the inspiration behind her lifestyle website. TikTok star and culinary contributor Eitan Bernath shares the history behind some of your favorite holiday treats

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Oliver Hudson, Ashlee Simpson & Evan Ross, Cooking with Jeremy Ford : Oliver Hudson stops by to chat. “The United States vs. Billie Holiday” star Evan Ross and his wife musician Ashlee Simpson join Drew and answer relationship questions. “Fast Foodies” host Jeremy Ford recreates one of Drew’s favorite fast food dishes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Seth MacFarlane & Liz Gillies, Drew’s Surprise For Family Who Adopted 5 Siblings, The Weekender : Seth MacFarlane and Liz Gillies on their new album. Drew surprises Andi & Thomas Bonura, parents of three, who adopted five siblings after hearing they were separated in different foster homes. Drew gives a list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Simpson, Drew Does…Line Dancing, Bearded Dragon Cooking with Chef Lenny : Jessica Simpson chats. Drew tries something new based on viewer requests in new segment “Drew Does…,” first up line dancing. Co-author of “Chef Lenny Cooking for Humans” bearded dragon Chef Lenny & his owner Valerie Musser whip up Ma’s Famous Carrot Cake.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jenny Slate, Tom Green, "Grey’s Anatomy" star Jake Borelli : Jenny Slate on her new book. Plus, Jenny and Drew play a rousing game. Drew taste tests deep dish pizzas from Chicago and declares a winner! Tom Green provides an update on his cross-country van trip. Jake Borelli co-pilots Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Julianna Margulies, “Outer Banks” star Chase Stokes, Eitan Bernath Shares Favorite Summer Dish : Actress Julianna Margulies stops by to discuss her new memoir “Sunshine Girl: An Unexpected Life.” Then, “Outer Banks” star Chase Stokes joins Drew. Culinary contributor Eitan Bernath whips up his favorite summer dish a watermelon feta arugula salad.

programme.desc: Lucy's Club Dance : Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girl friends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Diner : Ricky becomes interested in a diner that is for sale so the Ricardos and the Mertzes all buy it together. Right away, Ethel and Fred feel they are doing all the work while Lucy and Ricky have all the fun.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Black Wig : Lucy decides to try a new look, despite her husband Ricky's objections. She borrows a black wig from her hairdresser Roberta, who tells Lucy it makes her look like a whole different person. With that in mind, Lucy decides to play a little trick on Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennessee Ernie Visits : Lucy's mother writes to ask if she and her husband "Xavier" would be so kind as to entertain "a friend's roommate's cousin's middle boy, Ernest" when he visits New York.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennessee Ernie Hangs On : Lucy and Ricky, tired of the extensive visit by their cousin Tennessee Ernie, try to get rid of the likeable character by pleading poverty. Ernie then tries to help his gracious hosts out of their fiscal desperation.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Golf Game : Golf pro Jimmy Demaret visits Lucy and Ethel on the green to show them how the game is really played after they're misled by Ricky and Fred. Lucy and Ethel decide they'll learn how to play golf to spend more time with their husbands.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Sublease : Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Cries Wolf : Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Matchmaker : Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Business Manager : Ricky Ricardo hires business manager Mr. Hickox to solve the family budget problems. Lucy, dissatisfied with her new $5 per month allowance, manages to find a loophole in the business manager's system.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mr. and Mrs. TV Show : Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Mertz and Kurtz : Lucy agrees to help her neighbor Fred Mertz impress an old vaudeville buddy who's in town for a visit. Lucy poses as the Mertzes maid "Bessie" to make Barney Kurtz believe Fred hit it big in real estate.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Movie Offer : Lucy mistakes Ben Benjamin, a Hollywood talent scout, for a burglar and nearly ruins Ricky's chance for a film career. When Benjamin arrives at the Ricardos' apartment to meet with Ricky, Lucy and Ethel smash a vase over his head!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Screen Test : Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders Ricky is a shooin for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Mother-In-Law : Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel's Birthday : Despite the reservations of her husband, Lucy decides to help Fred pick out a birthday present for Ethel. She picks out a pair of toreador pants, which Ethel thinks are unflattering as well as too big.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's Contract : Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Getting Ready : A movie contract for Ricky necessitates a change in scenery and the hanging of a "for rent" sign on the Ricardos' New York home. The Mertzes, willing to give up tenants but not friends, sign on for the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Learns To Drive : For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: California Here We Come : Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: First Stop : The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennesse Bound : The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel's Home Town : The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: L.A. At Last : After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Don Juan and the Starlets : Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets In Pictures : Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Christmas Show : Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Body : Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Reunion : A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Umpire : Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 1) : Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 2) : Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Hucksters : Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Lovelorn : When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Christmas Show : Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Body : Ben Matlock learns there is more to an exclusive health spa than workouts when his client, Donna Stewart, is accused of murdering a sexy, young exercise instructor who had been having an affair with her husband.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Umpire : Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 1) : Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 2) : Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Battle Stations : The autobots continue on their journey and intercept a decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Alpha Q: Identity : The autobots continue their planning on taking out Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Shockblast: Rampage : Unicron's arrival causes the Decepticons on Cybertron to rebel, while Kicker learns the truth about Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Survival Instincts : Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, while Kicker tries to convince the Autobots to listen to Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Each One Fights… : Starved for energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Unicron Unleased : Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, in order to allow Unicron to "feed" on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Open Fire : Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Ripped Up Space : As the Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body and with Megatron throwing everything at them, Alpha Q provides support by fighting for the control of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Team Optimus Prime : Limping to join with the rest of the Autobots, Optimus Prime is confronted by Shockblast, who plans to take out Optimus Prime so as to prove that he is more superior than Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Protection : Megatron escapes into a black hole and Optimus Prime decides to give chase, even though he doesn’t know what he will find on the other side. Kicker joins his Autobot friends on their mission and pilots the Miranda II into the black hole.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Imprisoned Inferno : On the other side of the rip, the Autobots must now defend a whole new set of planets, and Wing Saber finally gets the chance to re-capture his prisoner Shockblast.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Jungle Planet : Shockblast has been captured and temporarily imprisoned on Iron Planet. Inferno is left to stand guard over Shockblast while the other Autobots are on Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Bulkhead : Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Farewell Inferno : The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Crash Course : Inferno uses his decepticon "half" to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Omega Supreme : The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: A Heroic Battle : Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Power of Unicron : Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Optimus Supreme : The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Unicron Perishes : The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Ambition : Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Wishes : The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Galvatron : Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Breakthrough : Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's "soul" is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Distribution : Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to breakthrough the energon grid and then later have to go under ground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Omega Train : The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Decepticon Army : The Autobots split up and with the help of other autobot rebels they attempt to find and free Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Ironhide Team : Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunite with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Formidable : Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. The terrorcons got into the super energon and grow in size.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Galvatron Terror : Primus is still snoozing, Sixshot overloads the grid and causes a huge explosion that takes down most of the autobots, and Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Trace of Evil

programme.desc: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill (Part 1) : Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: One Giant Pick for Mankind : The guys uncover a former firefighter's stockpile which includes a rare piece of space-age history; Frank's plan goes up in smoke.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Time Warp : Mike and Frank are stunned by a house with storefronts frozen in time, containing a bounty of new-old stock and a secret bootlegging basement.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Hobo Jack : Danielle tells the guys they need to step up their game; Mike and Frank uncover lots of great stuff in Tony's sprawling Illinois collection; Ken has room after room of unusual items; Danielle calls with a lead about Hobo Jack.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Empire Picks Back : Mike and Frank use the force to unveil a secret Star Wars stash in California; the guys try to make a deal on a mint '56 Chevy Belair.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Coin-Op Kings : The guys find the ultimate coin-op man cave hidden on a farm in upstate New York; Frank devises a plan to help lonely collectors find love.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Virginia Is for Pickers : It's a picking blitz in Virginia as Mike, Frank, Robbie, and Danielle hit the road to leave no lead unturned.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The $90,000 Question : When they uncover one of the rarest motorcycles in the world, Mike and Frank must come up with more cash than ever before to try and seal the deal.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Raze the Roof : A Kentucky collector is eager to sell his stock before the roof of the building caves in; a pack rat in West Virginia wants to sell some of his collection.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The King's Ransom : The guys find an elephant, an alligator and a life-size sculpture of Elvis in rural Vermont; a treasure trove of folk art finds and rare military memorabilia; Danielle gets encouraging news from an appraiser.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Gordon's Gold Mine : Mike and Frank find the holy grail of picking in Gordon's cement factory; the guys scour the inventory of a father-and-son picking duo; the guys meet Mary who has inherited a 300-acre property.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Hometown Pickin' : The guys find themselves waist deep in Kenny's ragtag collection; a man's stockpile is so large that he keeps it in an old school; a pair of muskets that could be centuries old; the guys pick in Mike's hometown.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Catch-32 : Mike and Frank have their work cut out for them on a huge property with more custom 1932 Fords than they have ever seen in one place; Danielle takes on an important military mission.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Rat Rod Rolls : A massive Ohio collection features a jam-packed farmhouse, a killer barn, and a rare rat rod Rolls-Royce.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Mother Load : Mike and Frank accept an invitation from Indiana's Model-A Ford lady and fall hard for her ultra-rare, barn-fresh Model-A tow truck.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: California Dreamin' : Mil Blair decides to sell some of his rare collections of motorbikes and memorabilia; Bird's temple of surfing; the guys get their new surfboards appraised at the California Surf Museum and make a generous donation.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Mega-Mall of Horrors : One night, a bright, and glittering shopping mall mysteriously appears in Riverdale.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Twisted Youth : Archie and the gang get a taste of what it's like to deal with teenagers when Mr. Weatherbee, Mr. Lodge and Miss Grundy drink bottles of contaminated water, causing them to revert to their wild teenage selves.

programme.title: Sabrina The Animated Series
programme.desc: Driver Ed : When it seems like Hilda isn’t going to pass a test for her mortal driver’s license, Sabrina conjures up a cute driving instructor to help & inspire her.

programme.title: Sabrina's Secret Life
programme.desc: J’achoo : Down in the Netherworld, anticipation is building for a witch-specific holiday (like our Valentine’s Day or Halloween – like Mardi Gras, with everyone wearing masks).

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Movie Set : Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour (a M.A.D. agent in disguise), in a M.A.D. movie, Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into M.A.D.'s hands.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Meets The Grappler : Gadget is planning a trip on the Oriental Express Mystery Tour Train and is warned by Quimby about a MAD plot to kill him while aboard.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gone Went The Wind : Dr. Focus of M.A.D. invents a machine called Sneezooka which creates the wind of 3 billion sneezes. Inspector Gadget finds the secret laboratory and destroys the machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Great Wambini's Seance : Pets owned by the city's rich and famous are disappearing and Inspector Gadget's job is to investigate and locate the missing pets. MAD magician, the Great Wambini is inviting the missing pet owners to a siance.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Weather In Tibet : M.A.D. has invented a weather machine that controls the weather and is demanding money from cities. Inspector Gadget has to find and destroy the machine or else the cities will be buried in snow.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Birds Of A Feather : Inspector Gadget's mission is to foil Dr. Claw from stealing the Star of Instanbul.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Bad Dreams Are Made Of This : Dr. Claw, with the aid of Dr. Spectrum and Bert Sweetley, uses a dream beam to give the citizens of Metro City nightmares. His plan is to make everyone too tired to work, so they will buy his Dreamway machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Snakin' All Over : Inspector Gadget's mission is to guard a priceless coin collection from the evil clutches of M.A.D.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Bad Dreams Are Made Of This : Dr. Claw, with the aid of Dr. Spectrum and Bert Sweetley, uses a dream beam to give the citizens of Metro City nightmares. His plan is to make everyone too tired to work, so they will buy his Dreamway machine.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Boat : Inspector Gadget's undercover assignment takes place on a luxury liner where the wealthiest people in the world are on holiday. His mission is to prevent Dr. Claw from stealing their jewels.

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Cast Of One : Borzoi oh borzoi; Rod and Wads

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Convertible Rights : It's neither from Guinea nor a pig; Run, Electrophorus, Run

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Who's Who On First : Counting sheep dog; All about the Benjamin

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Gimme a Brake : The cat's meow; The Professor's magnetic personality

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Jeckle and Hide : 101, just 1 dalmatian; Faraday explained

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Werewolf Art Thou, Igor : What's yours is Mynah; The Professor takes a bow

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: Igor, Lord of the Raindance : The doctor's New-Found(land) hobby; The Professor plays musical plates

programme.title: Hilarious House of Frightenstein
programme.desc: B-B-Cue Line : Setter down, Igor; Doppler Effect explained

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: James Brown : James Brown was an American singer, songwriter, record producer, dancer and bandleader. The founding father of funk music and a major figure of 20th century popular music and dance, he is often referred to as the Godfather of Soul.

programme.title: Aretha Franklin - Rock Legends
programme.desc: Aretha Franklin - Rock Legends : After a period at Columbia Records, Franklin signed to Atlantic Records in 1967, where she achieved her commercial acclaim and success with songs such as Respect, (You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman, Spanish Harlem and Think.

programme.title: Elton John: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Elton John: Live in London 2013 : Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

programme.title: Beyoncé - Sound of Change
programme.desc: Beyoncé - Sound of Change : The Sound Of Change was a benefit concert held at Twickenham Stadium, London, England, as part of the Chime For Change initiative, founded by Beyoncé with the help of actress Salma Hayek and Gucci's creative director, Frida Giannini.

programme.title: LL Cool J - Countdown Concert
programme.desc: LL Cool J - Countdown Concert : James Todd Smith III, best known by the stage name of LL Cool J, is an American hip-hop artist and actor. He is best known for his romantic ballads.

programme.title: Live at The Metro Theatre - Public Enemy
programme.desc: Live at The Metro Theatre - Public Enemy : Public Enemy, also known as PE, is an influential hip hop group from Long Island, New York, known for its politically charged lyrics, criticism of the media, and activism. Here, the group performs at The Metro Theatre, in Sydney, on Dec 27, 2008.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London
programme.desc: Guns N' Roses - Live From The O2 Arena London : Watch this production of Guns N' Roses performing live at the O2 Arena featuring hits; Paradise City, Sweet Child O' Mine, November Rain and many more.

programme.title: Motörhead - Rock Im Park
programme.desc: Motörhead - Rock Im Park : Rock im Park is a music festival that takes place in Nuremberg, Germany, lasting three days; featuring: Motörhead.

programme.title: Qello Concerts' Best
programme.desc: Qello Concerts' Best : The best of Qello Concerts.

programme.title: Iggy Pop - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Iggy Pop - Austin City Limits : The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Andrea Bocelli: Live in Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrea Bocelli: Live in Tuscany : Vivere: Live in Tuscany is a concert performed by classical singer Andrea Bocelli.

programme.desc: Birmingham City vs. West Bromwich Albion : From St. Andrew's @ Knighthead Park in Birmingham, England, United Kingdom.

programme.title: Bundesliga Soccer
programme.desc: FC Bayern München vs. Eintracht Frankfurt : Bayern Munich hosts Eintracht Frankfurt at the Allianz Arena for Matchday 23. Leader Bayern holds a six-point lead over Borussia Dortmund. Frankfurt ended a nine-game winless run by beating Borussia Monchengladbach 3-0 under coach Albert Riera.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Prunella's Tent of Portent/Mutiny on the Pitch : At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List : Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky's "A" Game/Brain and the Time Capsule : When Binky gets an "A" on a test, Muffy and Francine are convinced he cheated. Is it possible that he actually studied? Brain makes a time capsule and gets overwhelmed by people asking to have their special belongings included.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Master Builders, Parts 1 & 2 : Buster struggles to build a birdhouse that will save the community garden from pests, while Muffy and Francine design a cat toy that will really change the pet toy game.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine and the Soccer Spy/Sue Ellen and the Last Page : When Ladonna befriends a new member of the Mighty Mountain soccer team, Francine becomes convinced she is leaking secret team info. The City Council has voted to close the Elwood City Library! Can Sue Ellen save it before it's too late?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy Misses Out/Arthur Takes a Stand : Muffy worries that her friends don't need her anymore when they plan a successful bake sale without her. Arthur thinks Mrs. MacGrady is being treated unfairly, so he decides the best to take a stand is to take a seat.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Take a Hike, Molly/Slink's Special Talent : When Rattles takes over Slink's paper route, Slink is determined to prove himself and earn his job back. When the Tough Customers go on a hike in the woods, Molly makes a few mistakes and has to apologize…but she refuses to!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Lost Dinosaur/The Princess Problem : It’s pretty hard to lose a dinosaur, but Rapty is missing! Can Bud be brave without his imaginary friend? D.W. loves the Princess Platoon series until she realizes that it doesn’t represent everyone.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Invasion of the Soccer Fans/Pal and the Big Itch : Kate appears to be hypnotized by the soccer game on the television! Can Pal, Amigo and Killer snap her out of her TV trance? Pal has to wear a cone and he takes advantage of his friends' special treatment, until it comes back to bite him.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn & The Special Someone/The Feud : Mr. Ratburn is getting married! Arthur can’t believe it. Teachers don’t have lives outside of school…do they? And Arthur and Buster get into an argument over a video game and pretty soon the entire third grade class chooses sides.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Rivals Came to Roost/The Longest Eleven Minutes : When Mighty Mountain’s school gets flooded, the Lakewood Elementary students have to share everything with them! The Internet is out! How will Muffy post to her blog?! How will Buster research aliens?! Looks like the most boring day ever.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy’s House Guests/Binky Can’t Always Get What He Wants : Muffy is terrified when peregrine falcons build a nest right outside her bedroom window. Can her friends help her cure her ornithophobia? Binky gets cast in a TV commercial and he’s certain his career as a superstar has begun.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy’s Car Campaign/Truth or Poll : Francine rallies the troops around a petition to help Lakewood Elementary protect the environment. Binky is convinced Mr. Ratburn’s math test was too hard, so Brain suggests he conduct a poll to find out what the rest of the class thinks.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fright Night/Citizen Cheikh : Buster’s Uncle Bob – portrayed by special guest R.L. Stine – comes to visit and tells Buster a spooky bedtime story. Then, Cheikh learns that he and his family will become American citizens!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Duty Calls – Parts 1 & 2 : Ladonna finds out the Army is transferring her dad to Oregon, and the whole Compson family is moving again. Fern and the others can tell Ladonna is upset, but don’t know how to help. What can they do to make the transition easier?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit : The 3rd grade class is putting on a production of “The Princess and the Pea,” and Prunella is at the helm as director! Then, Mom and Dad tell D.W. she’s too young to watch a new television show that everyone is talking about.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown : George creates a piece of art for the county-wide art show with the help of guest artist Kevin Sampson. Then, Arthur must learn how to control his temper after getting angry over a pair of sneakers!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2 : When Mrs. MacGrady is diagnosed with cancer, Arthur and his friends all react differently to the news. The kids must learn how to come together to help support each other and Mrs. MacGrady.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'s New Best Friend/Freaky Tuesday : D.W. meets 13-year-old Hana, who is much older and totally cool! Is Hana D.W's new BFF? Then, Buster is convinced teachers have it easy. Can he put himself in Mr. Ratburn’s shoes to find out what it’s like to be a teacher?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed : Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Making Conversation/A Cloudy Day : Talking to adults makes George want to hide! When he learns he must go to a grown-up party, he turns to his friends for help. Then, Arthur and his friends learn that old silent films can be just as much fun as the movies they’re used to.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Listen Up!/Arthur's New Old Vacation : When Francine's Bubbe passes away, Muffy tries to understand how she can help her friend. Then, when Arthur's family goes on the same vacation they take every year, he and Buster try to make it more exciting.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Blabbermouth/All Grown Up : Buster is hurt when he learns his friends don't trust him to keep a secret. Then, the gang finds a mysterious fortune telling game at the library and gets a hint of what their futures could hold.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Eyes / Francine's Bad Hair Day : For some reason, Arthur isn't doing very well in school anymore. Maybe he just needs some glasses? Problem is, Arthur hates having to wear them. And it's school picture day and Muffy is determined that Francine will look her best.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur and The Real Mr. Ratburn/Arthur's Spelling Trubble : It's the first day of third grade and Arthur's biggest fear has come true--his new teacher is the dreaded Mr. Ratburn. Then, it’s time for the all-school spellathon. Arthur is chosen to compete, and he finds facing Prunella and The Brain!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. All Wet/Buster's Dino Dilemma : The Reads are having a wonderful time at the beach, except for D.W. who simply refuses to have fun. Next, Buster and Arthur make a long-awaited field trip to a dinosaur excavation.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds : Romantic sparks fly between a wealthy businessman and a struggling single mother who works as a cleaner in his office building.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married Too?
programme.desc: Why Did I Get Married Too? : While on vacation in the Bahamas, the unexpected arrival of one's ex-husband causes some longtime friends to examine the strength of their own marriages.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Family That Preys
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's the Family That Preys : Secrets and scandals test the friendship of a wealthy socialite (Kathy Bates) and a working-class woman (Alfre Woodard), upsetting both their families.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Acrimony
programme.desc: Tyler Perry's Acrimony : A faithful wife who is tired of standing by her devious husband is enraged when it becomes clear she has been betrayed.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: Snowpiercer : A post-apocalyptic ice age forces humanity's last survivors aboard a globe-spanning supertrain. One man (Chris Evans) will risk everything to lead a revolt for control of the engine and the future of the world.

programme.title: Vice
programme.desc: Vice : Gov. George W. Bush of Texas picks Dick Cheney, the CEO of Halliburton Co., to be his Republican running mate in the 2000 presidential election. When Bush becomes victorious, Cheney uses his newfound power to help reshape the country and the world.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Red Dawn : After foreign troops seize control of an American town, a group of young people takes refuge in the surrounding woods and launches guerrilla attacks against the enemy.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Seconds From Touchdown : A turboprop aflame is just seconds from the tarmac in Montreal when it flips over and crashes to the ground.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: The Invisible Plane : SAS Flight 686 takes off from Milan's Linate Airport and moments later collides with a Cessna on the runway.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Engines Out : A look at how engine failures cause near-fatal accidents.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Sideswiped : A Boeing 737 leaving Panama City crashes into one of the most remote and treacherous jungles on the planet.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Falling to Pieces : On May 25, 1979, Flight 191 crashes into a trailer park moments after takeoff; 271 people aboard were killed.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Hudson River Runway : Shortly after take-off, US Airways Flight 1549 encounters a bird strike and lands on the Hudson River.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Peril Over Portugal : Martinair Flight 495, a DC-10, crashes when attempting to land at Portugal's Faro Airport amid thunderstorms and heavy rain.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: The Death of JFK Jr. : When John F. Kennedy Jr.'s Piper Saratoga crashed in 1999, the NTSB faces big pressure to find the wreckage and the cause.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Kathmandu Descent : A challenging descent in the Himalayas turns tragic when the pilots miscalculate their approach to a Kathmandu airport.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: The Accident Files : Examining multiple aviation disasters that prove to have similarities.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Grand Canyon Disaster : Experts investigate the collision of two planes over the Grand Canyon in 1956, uncovering a frightening problem that threatened the entire aviation system.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Nowhere to Land : Pilots of TACA Flight 110 make a remarkable landing on a narrow levee, but investigators must find out why the engines in a brand-new plane failed.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Impossible Landing : A shocking look at the fate of United Airlines Flight 232 which crashed into Sioux City's runway in 1989 causing a subsequent explosion that left 111 people dead.

programme.title: Mayday: Accident Files
programme.desc: Water Ditchings : Three last-resort maneuvers where open water is the only available runway.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Double Trouble: TransAir Cargo Flight 671 : After an explosion rips both engines off the right wing, the pilots of Transair 671 manage a landing at a French military airfield.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Whitney : A southern belle from small town Georgia, Whitney is definitely the baby of the family. But with her mom pregnant as well, the house gets too crowded, and Whitney and her boyfriend must figure out how to move out.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Catelynn : 16 year-old Catelynn is the voice of reason in an otherwise hot-tempered family. With the support of her boyfriend Tyler, she's taking the biggest stand of her life and pursuing adoption without the approval of her parents.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: The Tipping Point : Farrah launches a new business, Ryan distances himself from Bentley and Larry on Father's Day, Amber decides to lose weight, and Tyler worries that Catelynn is resuming her unhealthy habits.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Lemons into Lemonade : Amber takes Leah back-to-school shopping, Maci is apprehensive when Ryan resurfaces in Bentley's life, Farrah prepares Froco's grand opening, and Catelynn's mistake triggers dark thoughts.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Surprise Surprise! : Maci turns 25, Farrah deals with a challenging employee, Tyler celebrates Butch's important anniversary, and Matt's troubled son arrives as Amber tries to clear up nasty rumors.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: 28 Days Later : Kelly struggles to adjust to life in rehab, and frequently calls home requesting various personal belongings.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Charity Case : Sharon and Kelly plan a trip to Kenya on behalf of a charity organization.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant

programme.desc: Agg on the Algarve : Bethan and Abbie's row impacts on the house, and it all kicks off when Nat calls Bethan and Beau's relationship 'toxic'. The Geordie's get stuck into the Sangria and tear up the strip!

programme.title: The Hills

programme.desc: Highdiculousness : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rockdiculousness with Steel Panther : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Ridiculousness 500 : On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Wheeler Walker, Jr : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matt Shively : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Ryan O'Malley : Laugh along with Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they break down hilarious Redneck Good Times, Nutflix, and Double Whammies. Guest Ryan O'Malley, a professional pogo sticker, shows the highs and lows of being Pogo Stuck.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville : Movie Star Johnny Knoxville helps Rob break down Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts, and Poorly Placed Kids. Learn why you're Never too Old to Slam and why birds are not your friend.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Big Black : Rob's former co-star Big Black joins the panel, breaking down Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair, and Coming in Hot. See how human scorpions sting in a whole different way than the spider that attacks an innocent dad.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Travis Pastrana : Action sports star Travis Pastrana helps Rob illustrate some Poorly Placed Trees and Whiskey Throttles. Rob breaks down Pastranabees and Animals Being Human. Explode with laughter at an ill-fated Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dingo : Action sports personality The Dingo joins Rob in breaking down Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios and things That'll Cost You. And you'll never guess what happens when a heavy lifter loses control.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matthew Mounce : Rob, Steelo, and Chanel laugh till it hurts at Unnecessary Combos, people who should Stay out of the water, and others who just plain wonder Who Put That There? Karate expert Matthew Mounce helps break down some Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jeff Tremaine : Producer Jeff Tremaine joins Rob in breaking down what it means to Lawnchair and Slam and Sprint. Some kids start slamming young in Ridiculousness in Training, and Rob points out Your Friend's a Dick.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matt Schlager : Beauty Queen Caite Upton joins Steelo on the panel. Rob breaks down the magic of Man-kinis and Dodging Bullets. Guest Matt Schlager demonstrates how to fall with your face first and hands second, in Getting Schlagered.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chris "Drama" Pfaff : Rob's cousin Drama helps Rob break down Family Dysfunction, Your Friend's a Dick, and Little Rollers. Credit Cards compete for pain against Popsicles. And learn whether Parkour is an art or just some Aggressive Running.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Judd Leffew : Bull rider Judd Leffew schools Chanel on whether bulls get dizzy when Rob breaks down A Bunch of Bull and Angry Animals. Watch fools compete in the Ridiculousness Decathlon. And a whole lot of people get Dunked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Biker Fox : Caite Upton joins Steelo once again as Rob shows off S**t Whips and Redneck Good Times. A lot of people blow out their money-makers in De-Faced. Biker Fox joins the panel for some fun in spandex and scrapes in Biker Down.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Ryan Dunn : TV star Ryan Dunn joins the fun as Rob points out the problems with Lower Education. See some folks who are clearly Out of Your League while others get slammed in That's What You Get and Let Me Help You Hurt Yourself.

programme.title: River Monsters
