programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Showdown in Pewter City : Ash challenges the Pewter City Gym Leader, Brock, but even Pikachu has no chance against Brock’s Rock-type Pokémon. With the mysterious Flint helping him, it’s time for Ash to train hard before the rematch!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Clefairy and the Moon Stone : A scientist leads Ash and his friends deep into Mt. Moon to find the storied Moon Stone, which is said to increase the power of Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Path to the Pokémon League : After earning his second badge, Ash sets off triumphantly for Vermilion City. Along the way, he hears of AJ, a Trainer on the brink of 100 straight victories. Full of confidence, Ash challenges this fearsome Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks : Ash meets some students, who are bullying their classmate Joe. Joe insists the rough treatment is necessary so he’ll be strong enough to graduate. Ash doesn’t agree.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Bulbasaur and the Hidden Village : Completely lost, our heroes reach a village not shown on their map. This quiet place is inhabited by Pokémon that have been injured in battle or abandoned by their Trainers.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Charmander – The Stray Pokémon : As our heroes press on toward Vermilion City, they encounter an injured Charmander, sitting atop a stone on a mountain pass. They later find out why it is waiting there.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Here Comes the Squirtle Squad : Ash and his friends walk along a path and fall into a hole dug by a group of mischievous Squirtle. Why is the Squirtle Squad such a menace to the local population?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Mystery at the Lighthouse : The party meets Bill, a Pokémon researcher who is waiting in his lighthouse for the coming of a one-of-a-kind Pokémon, never before seen by humans. Could such a Pokémon truly exist?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Electric Shock Showdown : Eager to earn a badge, Ash challenges Lt. Surge. Pikachu reluctantly enters the battle, only to discover that its opponent is a Raichu, a fierce Pokémon with tremendous electric power—and the evolved form of Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Battle Aboard the St. Ann : Ash and his friends board the cruise ship St. Anne, thanks to tickets provided by Jessie and James in disguise. Their latest plan is to lure Pokémon Trainers onto the ship and steal their Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.desc: Episode 7 : Garfield tells the story of the Pied Piper of Hamlin, who has a cat.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Twice Told Tale/Orson Goes on Vacation/Wedding Bell Blues : Jon and Garfield's house gets filled with yogurt./Orson goes away and leaves Wade in charge./Garfield thinks Jon is getting married and tries to stop a wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: The Curse of Klopman/Mud Sweet Mud/Rainy Day Dreams : Garfield inherits the cursed diamond./The farm folk decide to clean up the place, Orson's waller becomes a prime objective./While Jon hosts a lady friend on a rainy day.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 12 : Odie finds a genie and is granted his wish to fly. A witch decides Jon will be her husband.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 16 : Garfield and Penelope imagine what it would be like to be married.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 16 : Jon gets to meet Vivacia, the TV horror show hostess of his dreams. Wade Duck is caught in a 60-minute style interview.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Hound of the Arbuckles/Read Alert/Urban Arbuckle : Garfield imagines he's a cunning Dr. Watson./As Orson looks through his books./Cactus Jake suggest that Jon try dating Cactus Jackie.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 09 : Garfield sits on Jon’s book and refuses to get up. Garfield thwarts a bank robbery.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 14 : Garfield demonstrates the importance of sound effects. The Wolf convinces the crew aliens have landed.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 13 : Garfield animates his own cartoon. Three fix-it canines come to the farm.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel : Garfield wakes up to discover he's in the wrong cartoon./Orson can't pick up a book without reading it./Garfield and Odie stay in a ritzy pet hotel.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 7 : Garfield is called up before the council. Garfield’s neighbor is being driven crazy by the cat’s antics.

programme.title: Garfield Specials
programme.desc: Garfield in the Rough : Garfield, Jon, and Odie head out into the great outdoors.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Fraidy Cat/U.S. Acres: Shell Shocked Sheldon/Nothing to Sneeze At : Garfield and Odie watch a horror film./Orson decides to hatch Sheldon./Garfield has a sneezing attack.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Rip Van Kitty/Grabbity/The Big Catnap : Garfield sleeps for twenty years and awakens to a strange future./Roy convinces Wade that the "law of gravity" has been repealed./The arrival of homemade cookies signal a "cat and mouse" game.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Maine Couse/First Aid Wade/Video Victim : The gang decide to keep a live lobster as a pet./Wade believes Orson and Roy are going to operate on his leg./Jon bets Garfield he can't go without TV for 24 hours.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 9 : Garfield discovers Jon’s new ventriloquist dummy is alive. Jon decides to take up skydiving.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Robodie/No Laughing Matter/The Attach of the Mutant Guppies : A mad scientist uses Odie as a model for a line of robot dogs./Aliens who have come to steal Earth's laughter./Garfield teases Nermal about giant mutant guppies.

programme.title: Garfield Specials
programme.desc: Here Comes Garfield : The first TV special starring the rotund comic strip staple Garfield the Cat. Here, he and his dull-witted canine cohort Odie end up at the pound.

programme.title: Garfield Specials
programme.desc: Garfield Gets a Life : Garfield and his owner are in a rut. Jon cannot seem to get a date, until a school for the personality impaired opens a new window of opportunity for Jon, but is shut tight for Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 1 : Garfield and Odie trick Jon into not taking a trip on his vacation.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 08 : Myron the Mouse tries to goad Garfield into chasing him. Edward R. Furrow is back psychoanalyzing the weasel and Orson.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 04 : Garfield goes to the Lamaar School of Cats. Roy Rooster learns the art of doublespeak.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: D.J Jon/Cornfinger/Five Minute Warning : Jon becomes a D.J./The super fpy, Double-O-Orson returns./Jon bets Garfield that he can't go five minutes without eating.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 2 : Two mice critics review a documentary./Wade is mistakenly hypnotized to turn into a monster./The network insists that Nermal tell a story.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 12 : Garfield gets free pizza. Jon’s new car falls in love with him.

programme.title: Garfield Specials
programme.desc: Garfield Goes Hollywood : Jon, Garfield and Odie audition for the talent show "Pet Search" in hopes of winning the $1000 prize and a chance at the finals in Hollywood.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: The Idol of Id/U.S Acres: Bedtime Story Blues/Mama Manicotti : Garfield's and Odie's minds are switched./Orson tries to read Cinderella to Booker and Sheldon./Garfield helps a small restaurant owner battle a large chain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Shredded! : A man is rushed to the ER, apparently clawed by a tiger, but he won't reveal the real source of his injuries; a patient says he's been shot in the head, but the bullet is nowhere to be found; a woman is brain dead, but one doctor thinks she can be saved.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Alice Cooper Returns : Rock Legend Alice Cooper left his prized Avanti in The Count's hands, and now, he's back to get it! Will Alice like what Danny and the crew have done, or will it be no more Mr. Nice Guy?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Continental Flip : Danny wants to fix up and flip a 1978 Lincoln Continental Town Car. That is, if he can bring himself to let it go. Meanwhile, Danny's crew answers the call of duty and transforms a 1954 Oldsmobile Rocket 88 into an old school police car.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The Coolest Cutlass : Danny and the crew are faced with a monumental task when they take on a botched restoration job on a 1968 Oldsmobile Cutlass. Meanwhile, the team is called on by some old friends to customize not one, but two Jeep Gladiators.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Big Fin Caddy : It's all hands on deck when Danny and the crew discover a truckload of unpleasant surprises hiding in a 1960 Cadillac Coupe de Ville that the client wants turned into a show car.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Alice and the Beast : The Count's Kustoms Crew hits the road to hand deliver Alice Cooper's newly restored 1963 Studebaker Avanti, and he blows their mind with his amazing car collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Vantastic Voyage : When Counts Kustom's master painter Ryan decides to paint his own van, the entire crew buckles in for a bumpy ride. Will cooperation and a little spite help Ryan turn his ugly truck into the ultimate 70s street machine?

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Expect The Unexpected : George wants his 1967 Chevelle to be perfect, but his car has had more rats than repairs and the engine bay is too small for his dreams. Brian’s 1960 Lincoln is full of surprises, and he moment something else is fixed, a new problem surfaces.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Speed And Style : Gary wants to restore a 1964 Mercedes 230SL, but his tight budget launches Dan into a headlong battle with a 50-year-old interior and a shattered cam shaft. Al wants to restore his father’s GTO, but FantomWorks discover it’s not the car Al thinks it is.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Wet and Wild : Joe challenges FantomWorks to build a replica of a legendary 1953 hydroplane that set a water speed record. Andy wants the perfect split window top for his 1963 corvette, but Dan finds hidden problems that launch a cross country search for parts.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Of A Kind : Mike’s 1939 Hudson Coupe-Convertible is the only survivor of three that were built. He wants Fantomworks to restore it to original condition – even though nobody knows what that looks like. Jim wants his 1970 Nova to be the ultimate dragster.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: All Metal Mustang : Nikkos wants a spectacular 1968 Mustang Fastback resto-mod. The all-metal masterpiece catches the eye of someone who wants it at any cost. Jim and Arlene want to enjoy their 45th anniversary in the same 1969 Firebird they rode in on their wedding day.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Throwing Heat : Kansas City Royals pitcher Tim Collins wants a ‘super-fast’ 1968 Mustang, but Dan has to first undo a nightmare combination of bad repairs and unsafe systems. Bob needs a FantomWorks reality check to get his beloved 1950 Willy’s Jeep back on the road.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Damaged Goods : Bo put his 1970 Corvette into storage thirty years ago. Dan discovers that the car needs repair of decades old vandalism. Steve’s 1964 GTO was smashed in an accident. Dan agrees to try and bring his mangled GTO back from beyond the grave.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Now You See It : Jerry shows up with a car in pieces, a U-Haul full of parts and a dream of a perfect Plymouth Business Coupe that desperately needs Dan’s help. Bill asks Dan to find him a 1972 Gran Sport and to restore it with hard-to-find features.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Thunder Time : Ian wants a 1956 ‘baby bird’ restomod that drives like a sports car. Dan’s solution – a GTO-Thunderbird combo that drives like a bat out of hell. Doc Pellerin’s 1937 Volvo was a regular winner at Concours car shows – until a shelf fell on the car…

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Mexican Cuisine : Chef Lazaro Perez joins Martha in her kitchen to cook a fiesta-inspired feast of carnitas and homemade tortillas, shrimp in a spicy chili sauce, and the iconic Martha-rita.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Arethusa Farm Dairy's Award Winning Cheese : Martha road trips to Arethusa Farm in Bantam, CT, and learns how they make their award-winning Europa cheese, visits their cheese caves, and makes their delicious cheesy risotto recipe.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Tomato Show : Martha shares her favorite tomato recipes from a tomato tart to Martha's favorite BLT to a simple marinara sauce.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: French Bistro Night : Martha gets a first-hand look behind the delicious French dishes at Cenadou Bistrot including mussels in a tomato sauce with housemade croutons and a flatbread topped with olives and anchovies.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Noodles : Pad thai; one-pan pasta; pho.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Braising : Osso buco; homemade corned beef; lamb shanks with apricots and olives.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Rice : Paella with chicken, pork, seafood and vegetables; stuffed peppers with fluffy rice, pine nuts, raisins and herbs; Persian rice -- basmati cooked atop potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Grains : Mushroom barley soup; couscous royale; grits with broiled tomatoes, cheddar cheese and bacon.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Eat Your Greens : Sorrel soup; pasta with grilled sardines and bitter greens; Swiss chard frittata; kale Caesar salad; escarole.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: One-Pot Meals : Stovetop clambake in a stockpot; risotto with shrimp and herbs in a pressure cooker; poached cod with tomatoes in a skillet; arroz con pollo in a Dutch oven.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Mushrooms : Buckwheat crepes filled with a mushroom mixture; vegetarian mushroom ragu served on rigatoni; French mushroom soup; mushroom risotto made with farro.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking With Wine : Beef bourguignon; cioppino, a tomato and wine-based fish stew; chicken marsala; poached pears in red or white wine.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Lamb : Butterflied, rolled and roasted leg of lamb; lamb tagine with spiced butternut squash and prunes; yogurt-marinated lamb kebabs; seared loin lamb chops served with mint jelly and fried fingerling potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Stews of the Arabian Gulf : Arabian Gulf pot pie; braised lamb shanks with okra; curried swordfish stew; red lentil vegetable stew.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Breads : Date flatbreads; flatout bread with seeds and raisin; coconut mandazi; eggplant flatbread.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Side Dishes : Creamed coconut spinach; eggplant with herbs and yogurt; cauliflower salad with roasted chickpeas; za'atar smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Entertaining for a Crowd : Chicken kabsa; stuffed cabbage and spiced lamb chops; orzo risotto with wild mushrooms; a sweet cake called kumajj.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Dates : Chicken machbous; mansaf; beef biryani; lamb ghouzi.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Coastal Favorites : Recipes featuring the bounty of the Arabian Gulf include crab croquettes, date pancakes, lamb dumplings and fava bean dip.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking With Grains : Kamut and roasted vegetables; mixed grain pilaf with chicken; herbed barley salad with dates.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Vegetables : Simple vegetable side dishes include steamed spinach, sauteed broccoli rabe, roasted cauliflower steaks, brown sugar-glazed carrots, sauteed sugar snap peas and shelled peas with mint and lemony kale salad.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Holiday Breads : Italian panettone with dried fruit and almonds; German stollen with dried fruit and marzipan; Greek Orthodox Easter bread embellished with bright red eggs.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Nuts : Traditional linzertorte; oatmeal cookies with a peanut butter filling; walnut cake; pecan tart.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Fruit Desserts : Pink applesauce-filled tart; pistachio brown butter cake with Concord grapes; pear frangipane tart; individual apple pies.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Phyllo : Ruffled milk pie; Moroccan meat pie; baklava; spanakopita.

programme.title: Wild Justice
programme.desc: Dog Day Afternoon : Wardens apprehend a suspect on Monterey Bay and make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Wild Justice
programme.desc: Home Grown : Wardens stumble across a huge marijuana field while patrolling for poachers and stop several criminals who may be producing illegal drugs.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: Truce & Termination : Rig 28 struggles without their biggest asset; Brandon's absence hits home; Tank Hannon shows up to settle the score.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: Sabotage : A rival crew pays Oscar and his crew a visit; the news of a long awaited bonus comes in.

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.desc: Love at the Jersey Shore : Deena and Snooki seek forgiveness from their boss, Mike and Paula grow closer, and JWOWW's outfit causes a commotion.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Sharp Objects : Deena and Snooki share a wild adventure when the roomies go fishing, Mike plays wingman for the guys, JWOWW confronts Pauly's stalker, and Snooki and Vinny spend time together.

programme.title: Canada Shore
programme.desc: Whassup New Fam! : Summer at the shore kicks off when the roomies move into a house together in Kelowna. The crew bonds and sparks fly, but all might be lost when a messy love triangle threatens to blow everything up. Sample of the new Paramount+ series.

programme.title: Canada Shore
programme.desc: Pick a Struggle : The roomies hop aboard the hot mess express. It's a rough ride as Emmy and Keyaira both want a piece of beefcake Bauer. When a tiki cruise gets wild, not even Captain Claudio can steady the ship.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The Truth Will Set You Free : JWOWW pulls out all the stops for her one-year anniversary with Roger, Mike plans payback, Pauly and Vinny redecorate the Smush Room, and the roomies warn Deena about Joey's intentions.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: One Meatball Stands Alone : Mike tells Jionni he hooked up with Snooki, the roommates try to protect Deena, and Vinny and Pauly plan an epic prank.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: We Are Family : One roommate isn't amused by Pauly and Vinny's prank, Mike spreads a rumor about Deena's sister, the girls start a water balloon fight, and everyone heads home after a wild summer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Reunion : Amy Paffrath sits down with the housemates to relive the biggest moments from the summer, including Mike and Snooki's drama and Pauly and Vinny's elaborate pranks.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Love at the Jersey Shore : Deena and Snooki seek forgiveness from their boss, Mike and Paula grow closer, and JWOWW's outfit causes a commotion.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Sharp Objects : Deena and Snooki share a wild adventure when the roomies go fishing, Mike plays wingman for the guys, JWOWW confronts Pauly's stalker, and Snooki and Vinny spend time together.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The Truth Will Set You Free : JWOWW pulls out all the stops for her one-year anniversary with Roger, Mike plans payback, Pauly and Vinny redecorate the Smush Room, and the roomies warn Deena about Joey's intentions.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: One Meatball Stands Alone : Mike tells Jionni he hooked up with Snooki, the roommates try to protect Deena, and Vinny and Pauly plan an epic prank.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Fierce Battle of Rolling Thunder : Despite interference from Aoi, Idate continues his run. Idate still trusts no one, and it’s revealed that during the Chunin Exams, Idate’s older brother was the proctor who posed the tenth question.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Last Leg: A Final Act of Desperation : Boss Jirocho waits, confident that Idate will win. But Aoi, the ninja sent by the Wagarashi clan, stands in the way.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Battle Begins: Naruto vs. Sasuke : Shikamaru is promoted to chunin, and he and his squadmates celebrate at a BBQ restaurant. In the hospital, Lee decides to undergo a dangerous surgery to repair his body so that he can remain a ninja.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Bitter Rivals and Broken Bonds : Naruto and Sasuke release their ultimate weapons against each other, and just in time, Kakashi arrives to stop the fight.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Oto's Invitation : The Sound Ninja Four, Kidomaru, Sakon, Jirobo and Tayuya, suddenly appear before Sasuke. Sakura is concerned about the Curse Mark placed on Sasuke by Orochimaru…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Formation! The Sasuke Recovery Team : Sakura’s pleas fall on deaf ears, and Sasuke leaves Hidden Leaf Village. When Tsunade learns of this, she summons Shikamaru to lead his first mission as a chunin.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sound vs. Leaf : The Sound Ninja Four race toward Orochimaru’s lair with Sasuke in hand. They’re discovered and challenged by the jonin Genma and Raido…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Squad Mutiny: Everything Falls Apart! : Naruto and the others are trapped in Jirobo’s Earth Dome Prison. They try to pound their way out, but the walls regenerate each time.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Full Throttle Power! Chōji, Ablaze! : After they are freed from the Earth Dome Prison, Shikamaru and the others take off after the remaining Sound while Choji stays behind.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Good-bye Old Friend…! I'll Always Believe in You! : After Choji takes the yellow pill it looks as if he may win the battle, until Jirobo transforms into Second State, giving him immense power.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Your Opponent is Me! : Assuming that the Leaf squad could never get past Jirobo, the remaining Sound ninja don’t bother to lay traps along the way.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: 360 Degrees of Vision: The Byakugan's Blind Spot : Neji takes on Kidomaru while the others continue their pursuit of Sasuke and the remaining Sound ninja.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Losing is Not an Option! : Kidomaru changes tactics and creates a bow and arrow to attack Neji’s blind spot.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Vessel Arrives Too Late : Naruto, Shikamaru, Kiba and Akamaru are in hot pursuit of Sasuke and the Sound ninja. Naruto and Kiba are upset that they have been unable to catch up and decide to try a surprise attack at night.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Miscalculation: A New Enemy Appears! : Akamaru sets explosives in the trees to trap Sakon. But an incensed Sakon turns the tables, and the explosives end up sending Kiba, Akamaru and Sakon off a cliff.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Roar and Howl! Final team work : Shikamaru is determined to stop Tayuya, but she uses her Summoning Jutsu to call forth three giants. Meanwhile, on the plains, the battle between Kimimaro and Naruto is about to begin.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: To Each His Own Battle : Ukon, who is able to infiltrate the bodies of others, enters Kiba’s body and tries to merge with his cells.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Fakeout: Shikamaru’s Comeback! : An injured Kiba and Akamaru barely escape from Sakon and Ukon. Naruto is locked in battle with Kimimaro…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The handsome one from the village of the Leaf! : Shikamaru succeeds in trapping Tayuya with his Shadow Possession Jutsu. But Tayuya moves to her Second State and fights back with enormous strength.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Beast Within : With Rock Lee there to take on Kimimaro, Naruto is free to chase after Sasuke, who has awakened.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Sand Shinobi - Allies of the Leaf : Shikamaru, Kiba and Lee are at the limits of their strength when Gaara, Temari and Kankuro appear to assist their Leaf allies.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Gaara vs. Kimimaro : Kimimaro realizes that close combat is impossible against Gaara’s wall of sand, so he moves further away for a long-distance attack.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Vengeful Strike: The Bracken Dance : Kimimaro succeeds in shattering Gaara’s protective sand shield and attacks Gaara. Naruto finally catches up to Sasuke…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Cry on Deaf Ears : With the Curse Mark covering half his body, Sasuke is no longer the Sasuke of old. Naruto charges at this new Sasuke who has turned his back on his closest comrades.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Brothers: Distance Among the Uchiha : Naruto tries desperately to change Sasuke’s mind, but Sasuke is determined to go to Orochimaru. He tells Naruto that in order to surpass his brother, Itachi, power and hatred are necessary.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Father-Son: The Broken Crest : Naruto is brought down by Sasuke’s Fire Style: Fireball Jutsu. It is a jutsu passed down through generations of the Uchiha family…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Secrets of the Mangekyo Sharingan : Sasuke quietly watches as Naruto sinks deeper in the water. He recalls the past when the Uchiha clan was cruelly slaughtered.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: For a Friend! : Kakashi uses his Summoning Jutsu and sends ninja dogs to track Naruto and Sasuke. With his newfound strength, Sasuke is serious about bringing down Naruto…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Plea from a Friend : Naruto releases his Nine-Tail chakra and sends Sasuke flying. Sasuke counters with his Fire Style Jutsu, but Naruto extinguishes the flames easily.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: The Best Of Richard Pryor (10/9/86) : Newly slender super-comic Richard Pryor discusses dropping 20 pounds for a movie role and driving his Ferrari across the US. Madonna spouse Sean Pean chats about life with the Material Girl.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: The Johnny Carson Show: The Best Of Carnac (4/9/81) : Albert Brooks and Susan Sarandon head to the couch for conversation topics ranging from how to know when you're in love to clam shucking.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S1 E24 - Garry Moore, Durward Kirby : Garry Moore and Durward Kirby team up with Carol and the gang for the evening, appearing in the sketch "Science Fiction Playhouse." Meanwhile, "Carol & Sis" features Carol three sheets to the wind.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S8 E19 - Family Show : Tonight's episode features Harvey and Carol encountering a wishing well, and another installment of "The Family", with Eunice and Ed suffering through Mama's recuperation after an accident.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S9 E22 - Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall : Two guests for the price of one--Dick Van Dyke and Tony Randall! Sketches include: Dick as a salesman arriving during a couple's quarrel, and Carol and Tony as marrieds with secret hand signals.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S8 E15 - Tim Conway : Tim Conway is back again as guest star in this episode, highlighted by his turn as a hapless bus boy at a "Beniha-ha" restaurant who steps into an absent chef's role...with very messy results.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S5 E1 - Jim Nabors : Jim Nabors is Carol's guest for the fifth season opener! Jim plays a chaperone who throws cold water on a romantic cruise. And Carol and Harvey are majestic in a King Henry VIII sketch.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show Ep. 39 : Ed Sullivan presents Gladys Knight and The Pips, Melba Moore, Richard Pryor, Connie Francis, Tel Smit, and Roy Clark.

programme.title: Ed Sullivan's Rock 'N' Roll Classics
programme.desc: Motor City Magic : Ed Sullivan presents performances by Four Tops, The Jackson 5, Smokey Robinson & The Miracles, The Supremes, Stevie Wonder, and The Temptations.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show Ep. 113 : Ed Sullivan presents The Animals, Barbara McNair, Burger's Animals, Dick Cavett, Franco Corelli, EydieGorme, and Enzo Stuarti.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show Ep. 68 : Ed Sullivan presents Janis Joplin, Honey LTD, Les Samurai, Ed Ames, The Carals, Buddy Hackett, Chet Atkins, Floyd Cramer, and Boots Randolph.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Hollywood Icons Of The '60s - Walter Matthau (7/22/86) : We’re spelling tonight! Walter Matthau and Johnny quiz one another on difficult words. Matthau recalls filming Tunisia and shows a clip from his movie, Pirates.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: The Johnny Carson Show: Comic Legends Of The '50s - Bob Hope (1/11/91) : Merry Christmas, Mr. Hope! Bob says he’s spending the holiday with his grandkids in Reno. Producer Gil Cates spills the beans on celebrity game show, What’s My Line?

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S10 E15 - Glen Campbell : Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing the poster of Barbara Streisand's "A Star Is Born." Elsewhere, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure to the Swine Flu, and much, much more!

programme.title: The Best of the Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde : Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's 'As The Stomach Turns.'

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S3 E7 - Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin : The legendary Bing Crosby and Rowan & Martin guest star! Bing plays himself in a sketch set in the famous Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys play crooks confronted by Fireside Girl Alice Portnoy.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: The Carol Burnett Show: S1 E17 - Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner : Carol's guests are Frank Gorshin and Lana Turner. Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard, who has just taken his unlucky 13th bride--Carol.

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ep. 20: Joan Rivers, Stiller and Meara, Alan King, Jack Benny, Nipsey Russell : Joan Rivers' "Problems With Fat Childhood, Marriage, Career"; Stiller and Meara's "Satire of a German Commercial, A Woman Buying a Doll"; Alan King's "Wife"; Jack Benny's "Rehearsing with Ed"; Nipsey Russell's "Slender Girlfriend"

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ep. 2: London Lee, Alan King, Irwin C. Watson, Jean Carroll : London Lee's "Dating"; Alan King's "Kids Getting a Dog"; Irwin C. Watson's "Wife and Heart"; Jean Carroll's "Mother's Day"

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show Ep. 14 : Ed Sullivan presents The Doors, Jack Benny, Yul Brynner, The Skating Bredos, Flip Wilson, Hugh O'Brian, and Robert Goulet.

programme.title: Ed Sullivan's Rock 'N' Roll Classics
programme.desc: The British Invasion : Ed Sullivan presents performances by The Beatles, The Animals, The Rolling Stones, Hermans's Hermits, The Searchers, Gerry & The Pacemakers, and The Animals.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Hollywood Icons Of The '60s - Walter Matthau (7/22/86) : We’re spelling tonight! Walter Matthau and Johnny quiz one another on difficult words. Matthau recalls filming Tunisia and shows a clip from his movie, Pirates.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Mississippi Delta : Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Russia : Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Thailand : Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Shanghai : Anthony Bourdain explores the vibrant, dynamic city of Shanghai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Zanzibar : In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Chaco : A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Massachusetts : This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Shanghai : Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Bronx : The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Iran : Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Jamaica : In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Scotland : In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Korea : After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Miami : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Madagascar : In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Budapest : For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Zero Sum : Skinner helps the Cigarette-Smoking Man destroy evidence in a bee attack.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Elegy : Ghostly images of female victims start to appear near murder scenes.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Demons : Mulder becomes the prime suspect in an apparent double homicide.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Gethsemane : A discovery frozen in the mountains of Canada is evidence of alien life.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Redux : Mulder accesses a secret facility, leading to the truth of Scully’s cancer.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Redux II : Mulder receives key information that could mean life or death for Scully.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Unusual Suspects : In a flashback, the Lone Gunmen meet and join forces with Mulder.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Detour : The agents investigate when several people disappear in a remote region of Florida.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: The Post-Modern Prometheus : The agents uncover a genetic experiment that has spun out of control.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Christmas Carol : A mysterious phone call leads Scully to investigate a woman’s suicide.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Emily : Scully and Mulder search for a cure to Emily’s illness.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Kitsunegari : Mulder and Scully hunt a criminal with powerful mind-control capabilities.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Redux II : Mulder receives key information that could mean life or death for Scully.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Unusual Suspects : In a flashback, the Lone Gunmen meet and join forces with Mulder.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Detour : The agents investigate when several people disappear in a remote region of Florida.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: The Post-Modern Prometheus : The agents uncover a genetic experiment that has spun out of control.

programme.title: Born to Fight
programme.desc: Born to Fight : A former NCAA wrestling champion (Wes Chatham), now an ex-con involved in mixed-martial arts, must save his best friend from a vicious loan shark.

programme.title: Frankenstein
programme.desc: Frankenstein : Married scientists create a modern-day monster.

programme.title: Border Run
programme.desc: Border Run : An American reporter searches for her missing brother amid the violence and human smuggling across the U.S.-Mexico border.

programme.title: The Wedding Year
programme.desc: The Wedding Year : A commitment-phobic 27-year-old's relationship is put to the test when she and her boyfriend attend seven weddings in the same year.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw
programme.desc: Texas Chainsaw : A young woman travels to Texas to collect an inheritance; little does she know that an encounter with a chainsaw-wielding killer is part of the reward.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: I, Tonya : In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure fellow Olympic hopeful Nancy Kerrigan.

programme.title: All Creatures Here Below
programme.desc: All Creatures Here Below : Desperate for money, Gensan and Ruby impulsively commit a crime which sets in motion a series of dire events. Now on the run, the couple seek refuge in Kansas City, Mo., a place filled with dark secrets that still haunt them.

programme.title: Puncture
programme.desc: Puncture : A lawyer who is a drug addict fights a medical-supplies corporation in court while battling his personal demons.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Endgame Part 1 : Voyager's quest to return home is aided by a visitor from the future – Admiral Kathryn Janeway.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Renaissance Man : Janeway is held hostage by aliens who force the Doctor to help them steal Voyager's warp core.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Homestead : Neelix is faced with the decision of a lifetime when Voyager locates a tribe of exiled Talaxians on a distant asteroid.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Natural Law : Seven and Chakotay stumble upon a race of primitive humanoids isolated from technological progress by an energy barrier.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Friendship One : Voyager recovers a long-lost space probe which has caused terrible radiation damage on a distant planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Endgame Part 2 : Janeway risks Voyager's shortcut home in order to destroy the Borg and save millions of lives.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Caretaker, Part 1 : While searching for a missing officer, Captain Kathryn Janeway and the crew of the Starship Voyager are swept 70,000 light years from home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Caretaker, Part 2 : The Voyager crew launches a daring rescue mission to save two officers trapped in a subterranean city facing disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Parallax : Tensions rise between the merged Starfleet and Maquis crews when the ship becomes trapped inside a star that's collapsed upon itself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Time And Again : When Paris and Janeway are sent back in time, they must decide whether to violate the Prime Directive by warning residents of a planet facing annihilation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Phage : Neelix faces certain death when an alien race stricken by a devastating plague "harvests" his lungs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Cloud : The crew discovers that a nebula is not what it seems, and Paris invites his fellow officers to share a little "R&R" in his holodeck program.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Eye Of The Needle : The discovery of a wormhole in deep space raises the crew's hopes of finding a shortcut home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ex Post Facto : After Paris is convicted of a murder he swears he didn't commit, Tuvok must play detective to clear him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Caretaker, Part 1 : While searching for a missing officer, Captain Kathryn Janeway and the crew of the Starship Voyager are swept 70,000 light years from home.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: On These Waters : Following a frenzied attack by gunmen aboard an American-owned river cruise ship on the Danube, the Fly Team heads to Vienna to investigate why the boat was targeted. Also, Forrester realizes his feelings of mistrust are affecting personal relationships.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Get That Revolution Started : The Fly Team works to hunt down the sniper responsible for killing an American during an attack targeting a biomedical lab in Belgium. Also, Jaeger clashes with her boss at Europol over her allegiance to the Fly Team.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Doomsday : Maggie and OA investigate the death of a safety inspector and its possible connection to a leak at a nuclear power plant.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Family Man : After a senator's daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom, the FBI must find the little girl before their time limit expires; they must dig into the senator's past for clues to who did this to his family.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Cops and Robbers : Maggie and OA hunt down a ruthless group of robbers who are posing as police officers to target armored trucks.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: Greek Tragedy : When two sorority sisters are found stabbed to death, the Fugitive Task Force heads to Virginia to hunt down the suspect before more killings occur. Hana agrees to meet with Ethan after he asks her for help with his latest troubles.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: 100% : While helping Ethan seek treatment at a VA Hospital, Hana puts out an SOS to the Fugitive Task Force when she is among those taken hostage by an enraged veteran.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: Four Bodies : A string of late-night murders with the same M.O. sends the Fugitive Task Force on a hunt for a serial killer with ties to a radical feminist group. Meanwhile, Nina's sister asks her for a big favor, causing a strain on Scola and Nina's relationship.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Black Penguin : The Fly Team and Jaeger head to Berlin when the 19-year-old son of an American billionaire is found unresponsive in his apartment. As the team works to determine if foul play was involved, they realize there's a shadowy group on the case as well.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Crestfallen : When a private jet carrying American citizens is shot down over Europe, the Fly Team looks into the man who missed the flight. Also, Forrester is conflicted when he receives information on a case from his mother, Angela, on the first season finale.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Unburdened : The Fly Team and new Europol liaison Megan "Smitty" Garretson investigate when an American police detective on the Federal task force is murdered in Paris.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Death Knell : Carter flees from a super warrior with a piece of technology that may be the key to defeating Anubis's new army. Injured and unarmed, Carter must use all her training to stay alive, while O'Neill and Teal'c race to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Heroes (Part 1) : When the Air Force sends a documentary crew to capture the historical importance of the Stargate program, the members of the SGC are resistant. Tensions rise when an emergency forces General Hammond to restrict the access they're given to the SGC.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Heroes (Part 2) : Assigned the task of capturing the importance of the Stargate program, a documentary crew is given a true look at the heroic nature and family-like bond of the soldiers of Stargate Command, when a key member of the SGC is killed in action.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Resurrection : SG-1 is sent to investigate the murder of a group of rogue NID scientists. They discover that results of the scientists' experiments may have combined DNA to create the ultimate evil: a human being that possesses the conscience of a Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Subversion : After Dr. Rush has a disturbing dream, he suspects that Telford may be a spy for the Lucian Alliance. Rush confides in Col. Young who suspects there may have been residual memory overlap during the doctor’s switch with Colonel Telford days before.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Incursion (Part 1) : When Col. Telford reveals the Destiny is in imminent danger of being boarded by the Lucian Alliance, they launch an attack on the Lucian Alliance’s secret base. Meanwhile, the Lucian Alliance forces Dr. Rush to help stage an assault on the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Incursion (Part 2) : The Destiny crew must fight for their lives when members of the Lucian Alliance come through the Stargate, hell-bent on taking the ship by force. Meanwhile, the Destiny starts having ship-wide power blackouts caused by deadly bursts of radiation.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Intervention : After Colonel Young and his military personnel are captured by the Lucian Alliance, Dannic abandons them on a nearby planet. Meanwhile on the ship, Dr. Rush, Brody, Chloe, and Eli attempt a risky plan to force the Lucians to surrender.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Chimera : Daniel experiences strange dreams centered around his possible knowledge of the Lost City of the Ancients. Suspicious that Daniel's mind is being manipulated, the team must find a way to help him while keeping the secret from the Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Pain : Members of the crew begin experiencing disturbingly realistic hallucinations. With the hallucinations spreading to other members of the crew, Dr. Johansen (Alaina Huffman) must track down whatever is causing the episodes before someone dies.

channel.display-name: Puto TV Classic TV Crime Drama

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A Depraved Heart : When Bubba’s friend Lori admits to him that she has contracted HIV from a shady real estate agent, Bubba is set on having the man indicted for knowingly transmitting the virus. Then, suddenly, the man is found murdered and Lori is the prime suspect.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Incident At Brewer's Pond : When mischievous Cowboy Habersham leads his buddies to a field to steal watermelons for a raucous party at a local lake, no one could predict that the night would end in the murder of Donnie Cole; a murder tangled in a web of infidelity and deceit.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A Love Lost : Sheriff Bill Gillespie's daughter Lana learns that her old flame, Lee Thompson, has arrived in Sparta and may be illegally running guns to a local hunting store owner, Raymond Mercer. He’s caught the attention of Lonnie Jamison, who fears the worst.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Singin' The Blues : While singing at her boyfriend Troy’s nightclub, LuAnn Corbin discovers that he is being forced by a shady drug dealer from his past, Brent Shaw, to use the club as a cover to sell Ecstasy. LuAnn is torn between love and her duty as an officer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs: Attorney At Law : Former Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs returns to Sparta and is instantly assigned his first case as a lawyer, representing an accused murderer, Delbert Pike. Pike claims it was self-defense, but the victim’s wife was a witness and says it was murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Every Man's Family : After his nephew Matt almost dies from a drug overdose, Bubba Skinner travels to Atlanta, Georgia to help him overcome his addiction to heroin. While investigating Matt’s drug supplier, he teams up with an undercover detective, Walker Harris.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A Baby Called Rocket : Sergeant LuAnn Corbin takes temporary custody of an abandoned baby boy found at a crack house after a drive-by shooting is reported in the Bottoms. When the infant’s young mother, a crack addict, comes to reclaim the boy, LuAnn struggles to let go.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Little Girl Lost : Tragedy strikes Sparta when a young alcoholic woman, Holly Maynard, kills a child, Denia Larson, in a hit-and-run accident; however, a second and unexpected tragedy sadly follows, which will expose certain tragic failures of the justice system.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Your Own Kind : Marissa and David, interracial sweethearts at Sparta High School, are targeted by a racist sniper who takes a shot at Marissa. Many people in town assume that David was the real target, because he’s Black, but then why was only one shot taken?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Good Cop, Bad Cop : Parker Williams is shocked to find his ex-fiancée, Beverly Ross, at a drug deal, but he’s even more shocked when Beverly accuses him of using excessive force during the arrest. He claims it was self-defense, but Beverly is sticking to her story.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Maybelle Returns : Former madam, Maybelle Cheseboro, has returned to Sparta, but this time with a legitimate phone sex business, instead of a brothel. Meanwhile, a city official, Drew Ward, is linked to the death of Jessica Lund, one of Maybelle’s phone workers.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Last Round : Chief Forbes starts a boxing program in Sparta to help young men at risk and has taken a special interest in one kid with a lot of promise, Kevin Brooks; however, Forbes soon discovers that Kevin is involved in a series of burglaries in town.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Ches And The Grand Lady : Lieutenant Lonnie Jamison’s wealthy aunt, Cordelia Woodlin, is back in Sparta and spending time with her very old and dear friend, blues singer Ches Collins; that is until Ches starts receiving racist death threats warning him to stay away from her.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Conspiracy Of One : Soon after Virgil Tibbs is hired by a local law firm, a pair of wealthy clients, the Bookers, are in a car accident; Chuck Booker survives, but Abby is killed. Chuck claims he was dodging a deer, but Tibbs suspects that Abby’s death was no accident.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Rabbi : A new synagogue in Sparta is plagued by vandalism, but when the temple is destroyed and the sacred Torah is stolen, Rabbi Feldman refuses Sheriff Gillespie’s help based on a decades-old anti-Semitic crime that Gillespie apparently helped cover up.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Quality of Mercy : Joe struggles to understand whether his friend was right in killing a dying man who pleaded to put out of his misery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ponderosa Matador : Adam, Hoss, and Joe vie for the attention of a pretty young lady named Dolores. Hoss talks Joe into entering a bull fight, but it doesn't work out quite as planned.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Legacy : Adam, Hoss and Joe mistakenly believe their father was murdered. They split into 3 different directions to confront the supposed killers.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Prime of Life : Ben becomes irritable and reckless when the completion of an important timber contract is hindered by an old rival.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Lila Conrad Story : Joe and Adam protect a saloon girl, who has killed in self-defense, from an angry lynch mob.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: My Son, My Son : Ben's plans to marry Katherine Saunders are upset when her son Eden is accused of killing his former girlfriend.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Alias Joe Cartwright : A man who looks similar to Joe uses Joe's name and gets Joe in the position of facing the firing squad.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Gentleman from New Orleans : The new stranger in town claims to be the famous pirate Jean Lafitte, and Hoss believes him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bullet for a Bride : While out hunting for a mountain lion, Joe accidentally shots Tessa Caldwell causing her to go blind. As a result of his guilt, Joe ends up proposing to the girl.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and the Leprechauns : In what is arguably the best comedy of the series, Hoss swears he has seen green elves running around the Ponderosa and a smooth-talking Irishman complicates matters even worse.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cheating Game : In this sequel to "The Waiting Game", Laura resents Adam's advice on how she ought to be running her ranch. A newcomer, Ward Bannister, comes to her aid, but is actually part of a scheme to steal her ranch.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Pure Truth : Hoss is suffering from spring fever, goes to the wrong town and is accused of bank robbery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Companeros : Mateo Ibara and his wife Carla visit the Ponderosa. Ibara asks Will to return to Mexico with him. Ibara and Will fought together for Juarez's cause and Ibara saved Will's life.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: My Son, My Son : Ben's plans to marry Katherine Saunders are upset when her son Eden is accused of killing his former girlfriend.
